detailed.def: The thoracic muscle that inserts on the laterocervicalia.

detailed.def: The muscle that inserts in the thorax.

detailed.name: abdominal muscle
detailed.def: The muscle that inserts on the abdomen.

detailed.name: leg muscle

detailed.name: metatibial spur
detailed.def: The tibial spur that is located on the metatibia.

detailed.name: procoxa
detailed.def: The coxa that is located on the fore leg.

detailed.name: protrochanter
detailed.def: The trochanter that is located on the fore leg.

detailed.name: profemur

detailed.def: The tarsomere that is distal to and connected to the probasitarsus.

detailed.name: fifth tarsomere of the fore leg

detailed.name: mesotrochanter
detailed.def: The trochanter that is located on the mid leg.

detailed.name: mesofemur
detailed.def: The femur that is located on the mid leg.

detailed.name: mesotarsus
detailed.def: The tarsus that is located on the mid leg.

detailed.name: mesobasitarsus
detailed.def: The basitarsus that is located in the mid leg.

detailed.name: second tarsomere of mid leg
detailed.def: The tarsomere that is distal to and connected to the first tarsomere of the mid leg.

detailed.name: third tarsomere of hind leg
detailed.def: The tarsomere that is distal to and connected to the second tarsomere of the hind leg.

detailed.name: third tarsomere of mid leg
detailed.def: The tarsomere that is distal to and connected to the second tarsomere of the mid leg.

detailed.name: fourth tarsomere of mid leg
detailed.def: The tarsomere that is distal to and connected to the third tarsomere of the mid leg.

key: fifth tarsomere of the mid leg

detailed.name: fifth tarsomere of the mid leg
detailed.def: The tarsomere that is distal to the fourth tarsomere of the mid leg.

detailed.name: metatrochanter
detailed.def: The trochanter that is located on the hind leg.

detailed.name: metafemur
detailed.def: The femur that is located on the hind leg.

detailed.name: metatarsus
detailed.def: The tarsus that is located in the hind leg.

detailed.name: metabasitarsus
detailed.def: The basitarsus that is located on the hind leg.

detailed.def: The tarsomere that is distal to and connected to the first tarsomere of the hind leg.

detailed.name: fourth tarsomere of hind leg
detailed.def: The tarsomere that is distal to and connected to the third tarsomere of the hind leg.

detailed.name: fifth tarsomere of hind leg
detailed.def: The tarsomere that is distal to the fourth tarsomere of the hind leg.

detailed.name: joint
detailed.def: The anatomical cluster that is composed of two sclerites connected by at least one articulation and the articular membrane located connecting the two sclerite.

detailed.name: abdominal mediotergite 3

detailed.name: first flagellomere
detailed.def: The flagellomere that is proximally attached to the pedicel.

detailed.name: abdominal laterotergite 8
detailed.def: The laterotergite that is located on abdominal tergum 8.

detailed.name: abdominal mediotergite 2
detailed.def: The mediotergite that is located on abdominal tergum 2.

detailed.name: abdominal mediotergite 4
detailed.def: The mediotergite that is located on abdominal tergum 4.

detailed.name: abdominal mediotergite 5
detailed.def: The mediotergite that is located on abdominal tergum 5.

detailed.name: abdominal mediotergite 6
detailed.def: The mediotergite that is located on the abdominal tergum 6.

detailed.name: acidopore
detailed.def: The anatomical space that is surrounded by the posterior margin of abdominal sternum 7.

detailed.name: acropleuron
detailed.def: The area that corresponds with the site of origin of the third mesopleuro-mesonotal and first mesopleuro-third axillary sclerite of fore wing muscle.

detailed.name: acrotergite
detailed.def: The area that is located anteriorly of the antecosta on the tergum.

detailed.name: adnotaular setae
detailed.def: The row of setae that is adjacent to notaulus.

detailed.name: adpetiolar strip
detailed.def: The area that is located posteromedially on the propodeum anterior to the propodeal foramen.

detailed.name: axillular line
detailed.def: The line that is sublateral, and extends between the medial end of the mesoscutellar arm and the scutoscutellar suture.

key: axillary region of the fore wing

detailed.name: axillary region of the fore wing
detailed.def: The axillary region that is located on the fore wing base.

detailed.name: axillar depression
detailed.def: The area that is located lateral to the mesoscutellar disc and is delimited posterolaterally by the mesoscutellar arm and anterolaterally by the scutoscutellar sulcus.

detailed.name: auxiliary propodeal carina
detailed.def: The carina that connects the posterior margin of the metapleuron with the lateral propodeal carina.

detailed.name: anteroventral cavity
detailed.def: The depression that is located anteroventrally on the vertical part of the metapectus.

detailed.name: anterior tentorio-scapal muscle
detailed.def: The antennal muscle that arises dorsally on the anterior part of the anterior tentorial arm and inserts anterolaterally (ventrolaterally) on the proximal part of the scape.

detailed.name: anterior stipito-palpal muscle

detailed.name: anterior second valvifer-second valvula muscle
detailed.def: The ovipositor muscle that arises from the anterodorsal part of the second valvifer and inserts subapically on the processus articulares.

detailed.name: anterior scutellum
detailed.def: The area that is located anteriorly on the mesoscutellum and is delimited posteriorly by a the frenal line.

detailed.name: anterior pronoto-laterocervical muscle
detailed.def: The pronoto-laterocervical muscle that arises lateral to the site of origin of the pronoto-postoccipital muscle and inserts on the cervical apodeme.

detailed.name: anterior mesonoto-metanotal muscle
detailed.def: The mesonoto-metanotal muscle that arises from the mesoscutum.

detailed.name: anterior glossal plate
detailed.def: The area that is delimited by the proximal, distal and lateral margins of the sclerites on the anteroproximal part of the glossa.

key: anterior flange of abdominal tergum nine

detailed.name: anterior flange of abdominal tergum nine
detailed.def: The flange that extends along the anterolateral margin of female T9.

detailed.name: antennal muscle
detailed.def: The muscle that inserts on the antenna.

detailed.name: annulus
detailed.def: The carina that is transverse and extends across the lateral wall of the terebra.

detailed.name: anepimeron
detailed.comment: The class definition is of the anepisternum, that is already defined as another class.

detailed.name: anapleurite
detailed.def: The pleurite that extends ventrally of the lateral margin of the tergum and dorsally of the coxopleurite.

detailed.name: banding pattern
detailed.def: The anatomical cluster that is composed of the strongly sclerotised areas corresponding with the annuli and less strongly sclerotised areas situated between them.

detailed.name: basal articulation
detailed.def: The articulation that is part of the second valvifer-second valvula-third valvula complex and adjacent to the rhachis.

detailed.name: admedian clypeal furrow
detailed.def: The impression that arises just medially of the anterior tentorial pit and extends distomedially on the clypus delimiting laterally a triangular, convex area of the clypeus.

detailed.name: basal hooklet
detailed.def: The projection that is located along the medial margin of the parossiculus.

detailed.name: basitarsal comb
detailed.def: The row of setae that extends along the ventral margin of the probasitarsus.

detailed.name: foretarsal rake
detailed.def: The anatomical cluster that is composed of longitudinal rows of spurs extending along the tarsomeres of the protarsus and are continuous with the row of spur of the preceeding and/or subsequent tarsomeres.

detailed.name: cercal bristle
detailed.comment: This class is equivalent with HAO:2031 (mx:9848)

detailed.name: chela
detailed.def: The anatomical cluster that is formed from the tarsal claw and the apical tarsomere, and is grasping in function.

detailed.name: clypeal tooth
detailed.def: The projection that is located on the distal margin of the clypeus.

detailed.name: clava
detailed.def: The anatomical cluster composed of the apical flagellomeres that are differentiated by size from the basal flagellomeres.

detailed.name: clavomere
detailed.def: The flagellomere that is located in the clava.

detailed.name: clypeal carina
detailed.def: The carina that is longitudinal and is located on the clypeus.

detailed.name: clypeogenal sulcus
detailed.def: The sulcus that corresponds to the clypeo-pleurostomal line.

detailed.name: crenulate ring of the metasoma
detailed.def: The area that is located posteriorly on the second abdominal tergum and is delimited anteriorly by an impression.

detailed.name: ctenidium
detailed.def: The process that is located on the annulus.

detailed.name: wing blade
detailed.def: The area that is located distally of the wing base.

detailed.name: ventral protibio-probasitarsal muscle
detailed.def: The intrinsic leg muscle that arises ventrally from the protibia and inserts ventrally on the articular membrane of the protibio-probasitarsal joint.

detailed.name: ventral metatibio-metabasitarsal muscle
detailed.def: The intrinsic leg muscle that arises anteriorly from the tibia and inserts ventrally on the proximal margin of the metabasitarsus.

key: ventral metapleuro-third axillary sclerite of hind wing muscle

detailed.name: ventral metapleuro-third axillary sclerite of hind wing muscle
detailed.def: The metapleuro-third axillary sclerite of hind wing muscle that arises ventrolaterally from the metapectus.

is_a.name: metapleuro-third axillary sclerite of hind wing muscle

relationships.target_name: third axillary sclerite of the hind wing

detailed.name: ventral mesotibio-mesobasitarsal muscle
detailed.def: The intrinsic leg muscle that arises ventrally from the mesotibia and inserts ventrally on the articular membrane of the mesotibio-mesobasitarsal joint.

detailed.name: unguitractor plate of the protarsus
detailed.def: The unguitractor plate that is located on the protarsus.

detailed.name: unguitractor plate of the metatarsus
detailed.def: The unguitractor plate that is located in the metatarsus.

detailed.name: unguitractor plate of the mesotarsus
detailed.def: The unguitractor plate that is located in the mesotarsus.

detailed.name: tyloid
detailed.def: The anatomical structure that is located on the flagellomere, elongate, convex and its width is at least one fifth of the diameter of the flagellomere.

detailed.name: trochanteral fossa of the profemur
detailed.def: The fossa that is located laterally on the proximal margin of the profemur accommodating the femoral articular process of the protrochanter.

detailed.name: trochanteral fossa of the metafemur
detailed.def: The fossa that is located laterally on the metafemur and accommodates the femoral articular process of the metatrochanter.

detailed.name: trochanteral fossa of the mesofemur
detailed.def: The fossa thet is located laterally on the proximal margin of the mesofemur.

detailed.name: transverse metepisternal carina
detailed.def: The carina that delimits posteriorly the metepisternal depression.

detailed.name: transscutal articulation
detailed.def: The line of separation that extends along the transscutal line.

detailed.name: transepisternal line
detailed.def: The line  that is longitudinal, extends ventrolaterally on the mesopleuron and corresponds with the site of origin of the second and third mesopleuro-third axillary sclerite of fore wing muscle and the second mesopleuro-mesonotal muscle.

detailed.name: tibial fossa of the profemur

detailed.def: The intrinsic leg muscle that arises medially from the profemur and inserts on the genuflexor plate of the fore leg.

detailed.name: mandibular acetabulum

detailed.name: malar area
detailed.def: The area that extends between the lower (anterior) eye margin and the anterolateral margin of the cranium, and its width is delimited by the width of the mandible.

detailed.def: The groove that extends between the compound eye and the base of the mandible.

detailed.name: malar depression
detailed.def: The depression that is located immediately above the base of the mandible on the side of the head.

detailed.name: lateral metepisternal projection

detailed.name: lateral metatrochantero-metafemoral articulation
detailed.def: The articulation that is composed of the femoral articular process of the metatrochanter and the trochanteral fossa of the metafemur.

detailed.name: lateral metapleuro-metacoxal articulation

detailed.def: The syntergum that is the posteriormost sclerite on the dorsum of the abdomen.

detailed.name: episternal foveae
detailed.def: The row of impressions that is located on the anteroventral edge of the mesopleuron and is correspond to the site of origin of the mesopleuro-mesobasalar muscle.

detailed.name: epistomal line
detailed.def: The line that extends between the anterior tentorial pits.

key: femoral articular process of the mesotrochanter

detailed.name: femoral articular process of the mesotrochanter
detailed.def: The articular process that is located laterally on the distal margin of the mesotrochanter and bears the femoral condyle of the mesotrochanter.

key: femoral articular process of the metatrochanter

detailed.name: femoral articular process of the metatrochanter
detailed.def: The articular process that is located laterally on the distal margin of the metatrochanter and bears the femoral condyle of the metatrochanter.

key: femoral articular process of the protrochanter

detailed.name: femoral articular process of the protrochanter
detailed.def: The articular process that is located laterally on the distal margin of the protrochanter and bears the femoral condyle of the metatrochanter.

detailed.name: femoral condyle of the protibia
detailed.def: The femoral condyle of the tibia that is located on the protibia.

detailed.name: femoral condyle of the tibia
detailed.def: The condyle that is located proximally on the tibia and inserts into the tibial fossa of the femur.

detailed.name: femoral fossa of the metatrochanter
detailed.def: The fossa that is located posteromedially on the metatrochanter and accommodates the trochanteral condyle of the metafemur.

detailed.name: femoro-tibial joint
detailed.def: The dicondylic joint that is composed of the femur and the tibia.

key: first mesopleuro-third axillary sclerite of fore wing muscle

detailed.name: first mesopleuro-third axillary sclerite of fore wing muscle
detailed.def: The fore wing third axillary muscle that arises anterodorsally from the mesopleuron.

synonyms.name: first mesopleuro-third axillary sclerite of fore wing

relationships.target_name: third axillary sclerite of the fore wing

key: flexor of the pretarsal claws of the fore leg

detailed.name: flexor of the pretarsal claws of the fore leg
detailed.def: The intrinsic leg muscle that arises from the profemoro-protibial joint and inserts on the unguitractor plate of the protarsus.

key: flexor of the pretarsal claws of the hind leg

detailed.name: flexor of the pretarsal claws of the hind leg
detailed.def: The intrinsic leg muscle that arises from the metafemoro-metatibial joint and inserts on the unguitractor plate of the metatarsus.

key: flexor of the pretarsal claws of the middle leg

detailed.name: flexor of the pretarsal claws of the middle leg
detailed.def: The intrinsic leg muscle that arises from the mesofemoro-mesotibial joint and inserts on the unguitractor plate of the mesotarsus.

detailed.name: retinaculum
detailed.def: The area that is located posteriorly on the fore wing, is ventrally curved and accommodate the hamuli.

detailed.name: frons
detailed.def: The area that is between the epistomal line and the anterior ocellus and limited laterally by the inner margin of compound eye.

key: humeral complex of the fore wing

detailed.name: humeral complex of the fore wing
detailed.def: The humeral complex that is located on the fore wing.

detailed.name: groove
detailed.def: The line that is located on the sclerite and is impressed.

key: genuflexor plate of the mid leg

detailed.name: genuflexor plate of the mid leg
detailed.def: The genuflexor plate that is located in the mid leg.

key: genuflexor plate of the hind leg

detailed.name: genuflexor plate of the hind leg
detailed.def: The genuflexor plate that is located in the hind leg.

key: genuflexor plate of the fore leg

detailed.name: genuflexor plate of the fore leg
detailed.def: The genuflexor plate that is located in the fore leg.

detailed.name: genuflexor plate
detailed.def: The sclerite that is located posteriorly along the proximal margin of the tibia and corresponds to the site of insertion of the medial femoro-tibial muscle.

detailed.name: frontal sulcus
detailed.def: The sulcus that is transverse and extends just ventrally of the median ocellus and is never connected to the scrobal sulcus or depression or interantennal area.

detailed.name: abdominal sternum 8
detailed.def: The abdominal sternum that is located on abdominal segment 8.

detailed.name: inner orbit
detailed.def: The area that is delimited by the inner margin of compound eye, the preorbital suture and the supraorbital trabecula.

detailed.name: frontal carina
detailed.def: The carina that extends along the lateral margin of the intertorular area (median margin of the antennal foramen) towards the vertex.

detailed.name: fore wing blade
detailed.def: The wing blade that is located in the fore wing.

detailed.name: basitarsal fossa of the protibia
detailed.def: The fossa that is located on the basitarsal articular process of the protibia and accommodate the tibial condyle of the probasitarsus.

detailed.name: 4th abdominal spiracle
detailed.def: The abdominal spiracle that is located in the abdominal segment 4.

key: articular membrane of the mesotibio-mesobasitarsal joint

detailed.name: articular membrane of the mesotibio-mesobasitarsal joint
detailed.def: The  articular membrane that is located in the mesotibio-mesobasitarsal joint.

detailed.name: 2nd abdominal spiracle
detailed.def: The abdominal spiracle that is located on the abdominal segment 2.

detailed.name: supraorbital suture
detailed.def: The sulcus that delimits anteriorly the supraorbital trabecula.

detailed.name: supraorbital trabecula
detailed.def: The bar that is adjacent to and parallel with the upper margin of each eye, which anteriorly terminates at the juncture of the transverse trabecula and preorbital trabecula.

detailed.name: surcoxal depression
detailed.def: The depression that is located anteroventrally on the mesopectus anterior of the precoxal carina.

detailed.name: pronoto-propleural arm muscle
detailed.def: The propleural muscle that originates from the pronotum and inserts on the propleural arm.

detailed.name: lateral pronoto-prophragmal muscle
detailed.def: The prophragmal muscle that arises laterally of the site of origin of the median pronoto-prophragmal and medially of the site of origin of the lateral pronoto-postoccipital muscles.

detailed.name: median pronoto-prophragmal muscle
detailed.def: The prophragmal muscle that arises medially of the site of origin of the lateral pronoto-prophragmal muscle.

detailed.name: adipose system
detailed.def: An organ system pertaining to fat.

detailed.name: alary muscle
detailed.def: The muscle that is attached to the dorsal vessel.

detailed.name: chorion
detailed.def: A hard shell external to the vitelline membrane of the egg.

detailed.name: laminated bridge
detailed.def: The area that is located proximally on the notal membrane near the processus articularis is sclerotised and is continuous with the second valvulae.

detailed.name: labral muscle
detailed.def: The head muscle that inserts on the labrum.

detailed.name: labral apodeme
detailed.def: The tendon that connects the fronto-labral muscle with the lateral margin of the labrum.

detailed.name: labial muscle
detailed.def: The head muscle that inserts on the labium.

detailed.name: knee
detailed.def: The anatomical cluster that consists of the distal part of the femur and the proximal part of the tibia.

detailed.name: intrinsic muscle of the propleuron
detailed.def: The propleural muscle that arises from the propleuron.

detailed.name: intrinsic muscle of the metapleuron
detailed.def: The metapleural muscle that arises from the metapleuron.

detailed.name: intrinsic muscle of the mesopleuron
detailed.def: The mesopleural muscle that arises from the mesopleuron.

detailed.name: intrinsic muscle of the harpe
detailed.def: The male genitalia muscle that arises from the proximal margin of the lateral surface of the harpe and inserts proximally on the median surface of the harpe.

detailed.name: intrinsic maxillary palp muscle
detailed.def: The maxillar muscle that connects two maxillary sclerites.

detailed.name: intervalvifer articulation
detailed.def: The articulation between the first valvifer and second valvifer.

detailed.name: interorbital plane
detailed.def: The area that is defined by the anatomical lines that are tangent to a point at the minimal distance from the eyes to the lateral ocelli.

detailed.name: interocular separation
detailed.def: The anatomical line that is the shortest between the compound eyes on the vertex.

detailed.name: intermalar distance
detailed.def: The anatomical line that is the longest horizontal diameter (major axis) of the oral foramen.

key: interarticular ridge of the first valvifer

detailed.name: interarticular ridge of the first valvifer
detailed.def: The ridge that extends along the posterior margin of the first valvifer between the intervalvifer and tergovalvifer articulations.

detailed.name: infrabuccal pouch
detailed.def: The pouch that is situated on the hypopharyngeal wall distally of the sitophore.

detailed.name: inferior pronotal spine
detailed.def: The spine that is located laterally on the anterior margin of the pronotum.

detailed.name: hypopharyngeal lobe
detailed.def: The lobe that is situated distally of the sitophore and proximally of the infrabuccal pouch.

detailed.name: hind wing third axillary muscle
detailed.def: The thoracic muscle that inserts on the third axillary sclerite of the hind wing.

detailed.name: hind wing base
detailed.def: The wing base that is located in the hind wing.

detailed.name: vertical epomia
detailed.def: The carina that is the vertical section of the epomial carina that begins ventrally and terminates at the junction of the transverse pronotal carina and the lateral epomia.

detailed.name: dorsal T9-second valvifer muscle
detailed.def: The ovipositor muscle that arises along the posterodorsal part of the anterior margin of female T9 and inserts on the anterior section of the dorsal flanges of the second valvifer.

detailed.name: endite
detailed.def: The lobe that is situated distally on the maxilla and the labium medially of the palps.

detailed.name: dorsal T8-T9 muscle
detailed.def: The abdominal muscle that arises from the anteromedian margin of female T8 and inserts on the anteromedian margin of the female T9.

detailed.name: dorsal surface of the mesoscutellum
detailed.def: The area that surrounds the scutellar plate and differs from it in sculpture.

detailed.name: dorsal salivarial wall
detailed.def: The conjunctiva that extends dorsally of the salivarial sclerite between the distal boundary of the salivary duct and the salivary orifice. The dorsal premento-salivarial muscle inserts on the dorsal salivarial wall.

detailed.name: digital spine
detailed.def: The projection that is located apically on the gonossiculus.

detailed.name: distal hypopharynx
detailed.def: The area that is located on the anterior surface of the hypopharyngeal wall and is delimited proximally by the infrabuccal pouch or the distal margin of the sitophore, distally by the salivarial orifice and laterally by the lateral parts of the prementum and the hypopharyngeal rods.

detailed.name: dorsal aperture of the phallobase
detailed.def: The foramen that is located proximally on the cupula.

key: dorsal flange of the second valvifer

detailed.name: dorsal flange of the second valvifer
detailed.def: The flange that extends on the dorsal margin of the second valvifer. Part of the ventral T9-second valvifer muscle attaches to the flange.

detailed.name: dorsal pronoto-procoxal muscle
detailed.def: The pronoto-procoxal muscle that arises dorsomedially from the pronotum.

key: dorsal ramus of the first valvula

detailed.name: dorsal ramus of the first valvula
detailed.def: The region that extends along the dorsal margin of the first valvula and bears the aulax.

detailed.name: digestive system
detailed.def: The organ system involved in the absorption of nutrients.

detailed.name: metacoxo-metabasalar muscle
detailed.def: The metabasalar muscle that arises from the metacoxa.

detailed.name: mesocoxo-mesobasalar muscle
detailed.def: The mesobasalar muscle that arises from the mesocoxa.

detailed.name: central nervous system
detailed.def: Collective name for all the nerve centers and their connective in the insect's body. In the context of Drosophila refers to the part of the nervous system consisting of the brain and ventral ganglia.

detailed.name: circulatory system
detailed.def: The anatomical system that is involved in circulation.

detailed.name: cordate apodeme
detailed.def: The apodeme on the anterior margin of female T9. The ventral T9-second valvifer muscle attaches partly on the apodeme.

detailed.name: line
detailed.def: The anatomical structure that is linear.

detailed.name: lobe
detailed.def: The evagination that is mostly membranous.

detailed.name: lower mesepimeron
detailed.def: The area that corresponds to the site of origin of the mesopleuro-mesosubalar muscle.

detailed.name: macrotergite
detailed.def: The syntergum that is located posteriorly of the petiole.

detailed.name: malar carina
detailed.def: The malar distance that is a carina.

detailed.name: coxopleurite
detailed.def: The pleurite that extends ventrally of the anapleurite and dorsally of the coxa.

detailed.name: occipito-cardinal muscle
detailed.def: The maxillar muscle that arises medially from the occiput dorsally of the occipital foramen and inserts on the proximolateral part of the cardo.

detailed.name: occipito-lacinial muscle
detailed.def: The maxillar muscle that arises from the occiput and inserts on the proximal part of the lacinial lobe.

detailed.name: occlusor of posterior thoracic spiracle
detailed.def: The spiracular muscle that arises form the mesopectus and inserts on the posterior thoracic spiracle.

detailed.name: ocellar hair patch
detailed.def: The setiferous patch that extends posteriorly or posterolaterally of the median ocellus.

detailed.name: vertexal sulcus
detailed.def: The sulcus that is horizontal and extends between the compound eye and the lateral ocellus.

detailed.name: preorbital suture
detailed.def: The sulcus that extends along the median margin of the preorbital trabecula.

detailed.name: orbital furrow
detailed.def: The impression that arises laterally from the antennal rim and extends along the inner margin of the compound eye.

detailed.name: organ system
detailed.def: A division of the whole organism into specialized systems.

detailed.name: ovipositor apparatus
detailed.def: The anatomical cluster that is composed of the ovipositor, abdominal terga 8-10, abdominal sternum 7 and muscles connecting them.

detailed.name: paraclypeal margin
detailed.def: The edge that extends laterally of the pleurostoma.

detailed.name: parapsidal hair line of mesoscutum
detailed.def: The row of setae that extends along the parapsidal line.

detailed.name: parapsidal ridge
detailed.def: The carina that extends along the parapsidal line.

detailed.name: parapsidal furrow
detailed.def: The impression that extends along the parapsidal line.

detailed.name: paraspiracular carina
detailed.def: The carina that extends along the lateral margin of the paraspiracular sulcus.

detailed.name: pars articulares
detailed.def: The articular surface that is situated on the anteriorly on the ventral margin of the second valvifer and forms the lateral part of the basal articulation.

detailed.name: acrosternite 3
detailed.def: The acrosternite that is located on abdominal sternum 3.

detailed.name: acrosternite 4
detailed.def: The acrosternite that is located on abdominal sternum 4.

detailed.name: acrosternite 2
detailed.def: The acrosternite that is located on abdominal sternum 2.

detailed.name: acrosternite 5
detailed.def: The acrosternite that is located on abdominal sternum 5.

detailed.name: acrosternite 6
detailed.def: The acrosternite that is located on abdominal sternum 6.

detailed.name: acrosternite 7
detailed.def: The acrosternite that is located on abdominal sternum 7.

detailed.name: acrosternite 8
detailed.def: The acrosternite that is located on abdominal sternum 8.

detailed.name: acrosternite 9
detailed.def: The acrosternite that is located on abdominal sternum 9.

detailed.name: ventral pronoto-procoxal muscle
detailed.def: The pronoto-procoxal muscle that originates anteroventrally from the pronotum and inserts posterolaterally on the procoxa.

detailed.name: ventral T9-second valvifer muscle
detailed.def: The ovipositor muscle that arises from the lateral region of female T9 and inserts along the posterior part of the dorsal flange of the second valvifer.

synonyms.name: Posterior tergal muscle of the 2nd valvifer

detailed.name: ventral plaque
detailed.def: The carina that is located ventrally on the scape and sensory in function.

detailed.name: venter
detailed.def: The area that is located between the left and right coxal foramina.

detailed.name: valvillus
detailed.def: The sclerite that articulates on the first valvula and projects into the egg/poison canal.

detailed.name: upper mesepisternum
detailed.def: The area that corresponds to the site of origin of the mesopleuro-mesobasalar, second and third mesopleuro-third axillary sclerite of fore wing and second mesopleuro-mesonotal muscles.

detailed.name: trochantinal lobe
detailed.def: The area that is extends along the extreme posterior margin of the mesopleuron anterior to mesocoxa and is delimited anteriorly by an impression.

detailed.name: transverse suture
detailed.def: The impression that delimits anteriorly the transverse trabecula.

detailed.name: transscutal impression
detailed.def: The sulcus that extends along the transscutal line.

detailed.name: transoccipital suture
detailed.def: The sulcus that extends between the eyes posterior to the vertexal sulcus.

detailed.name: transepimeral sulcus
detailed.def: The sulcus that separates the upper mesepimeron from the lower mesepimeron.

detailed.name: transepimeral line
detailed.def: The line that corresponds to the ventral margin of the site of origin of the anterior mesopleuro-mesofurcal muscle.

detailed.name: frenal carina
detailed.def: The frenal line that is a carina.

detailed.name: frenal sulcus
detailed.def: The frenal line that is a sulcus.

detailed.name: mesotrochantero-mesobasalar muscle
detailed.def: The mesobasalar muscle that arises from the mesotrochanter.

detailed.name: torma
detailed.def: The process that is located on the proximolateral corner of the labrum. The torma corresponds to the site of attachment for the posterior fronto-labral muscle.

key: third axillary sclerite of the hind wing

detailed.name: third axillary sclerite of the hind wing
detailed.def: The third axillary sclerite that is located on the metathorax.

key: third axillary sclerite of the fore wing

detailed.name: third axillary sclerite of the fore wing
detailed.def: The third axillary sclerite that is located on the mesothorax.

detailed.name: terminal spine
detailed.def: The spine that is located apically on the last clavomere.

detailed.name: tergosternal sulcus
detailed.def: A groove that is longitudinal and extends laterally on the petiole separating a dorsal and a ventral petiolar areas.

detailed.name: tergo-valvifer articulation
detailed.def: The articulation that is located between the female T9 and the first valvifer and is composed of the ninth tergal condyle of the first valvifer and the first valviferal fossa of the ninth tergite.

detailed.name: tentorio-mandibular muscle
detailed.def: The mandibular muscle arises ventrolaterally from the anterior part of the anterior tentorial arm and inserts dorsomedially on the proximal part of mandible.

detailed.name: tentorio-cardinal muscle
detailed.def: The maxillary muscle that arises from the anterior region of the cranium and inserts adjacent to the cardino-stipital hinge.

detailed.name: T9-genital membrane muscle
detailed.def: The ovipositor muscle that arises from the cordate apodeme and inserts dorsally on the proximal part of the genital membrane and on the opposite cordate apodeme.

detailed.name: T8-first valvifer muscle
detailed.def: The ovipositor muscle that originates from the lateral part of female T8 and inserts on the dorsal margin of the first valvifer.

detailed.name: anterior metanoto-metacoxal muscle
detailed.def: The metacoxal muscle that arises laterally from the metanotum, anterior to the site of origin of the posterior metanoto-metacoxal muscle.

detailed.name: metanoto-metabasalar muscle
detailed.def: The metabasalar muscle that arises from the metanotum.

detailed.name: mesonoto-mesolaterophragmal muscle
detailed.def: The mesolaterophragmal muscle that arises from the mesonotum.

detailed.name: mesonoto-mesocoxal muscle
detailed.def: The mesocoxal muscle that arises from the mesonotum and inserts on the posterior margin of the mesocoxa.

detailed.name: mesonoto-mesobasalar muscle
detailed.def: The mesobasalar muscle that arises from the mesonotum.

detailed.name: subsalivarial gland
detailed.def: The gland that is situated ventrally of the salivarium and empties into the salivarium.

detailed.name: mesosternal shelf
detailed.def: The area that is located ventrally on the mesopectus between the mesocoxal depression and the epicnemial carina.

detailed.name: subpetiolar process
detailed.def: The process that is located anteroventrally on the petiole.

detailed.name: subocular area
detailed.def: The area that is located between the malar sulcus and preorbital suture.

detailed.name: submetapleural ridge
detailed.def: The carina that extends from the ventral margin of the spiracular groove to the anterior margin of the metapectal-propodeal complex.

detailed.name: submedian groove
detailed.def: The line that is lobgitudinal and is located  closer to the midline than to the lateral margin of the mesoscutellum.

detailed.name: submedian carina of propodeum
detailed.def: The carina that is longitudinal and extends closer to the midline than to the lateral margin of the propodeum.

detailed.name: sublateral groove
detailed.comment: no reference, the class is already defined using different labels.

detailed.name: mediosternite
detailed.def: The sternite that is located medially on an abdominal sternum.

detailed.name: subglossal brush
detailed.def: The row of setae that is located laterally at the base of the glossa.

detailed.name: subcoxa
detailed.comment: There is no subcoxa in Hymenoptera, the definition is a theory.

detailed.name: stylus of the third valvula
detailed.def: The sclerite that is connected to the distal end of the third valvula via conjunctiva.

detailed.name: dorsal valve
detailed.def: The area that is articulated with the right and left second valvifers at the basal articulation and bears the rhachises.

detailed.name: stridulatory organ
detailed.def: The anatomical cluster that is composed of the plectrum and the stridulitrum.

detailed.name: stipito-lacinial muscle
detailed.def: The maxillar muscle that arises along the lateral margin of the posterior stipital sclerite and inserts proximally on the median wall of the stipes just proximal to the lacinal lobe.

detailed.name: stipito-galeal muscle
detailed.def: The maxillar muscle that arises from the posterior sclerite of the stipes medial to the site of origin of the stipito-lacinial muscle and inserts on the median wall of the galeo-lacinial complex distal to the stipito-lacinial muscle.

detailed.name: sternopleurite
detailed.def: The pleurite that located medially of the coxa and laterally of the sternum.

detailed.name: sternaular area
detailed.def: The area that is located between the epicnemial carina and the anterior margin of the femoral depression.

detailed.name: prospinasterno-profurcal muscle
detailed.def: The profurcal muscle that arises form the prospinasternum.

detailed.name: paraspiracular sulcus
detailed.def: The sulcus that is longitudinal and extends posteriorly of the first abdominal spiracle.

detailed.name: spiracular groove
detailed.def: The impression that extends dorsally on the metapectal-propodeal complex from its anterior margin to the first abdominal spiracle.

detailed.name: speculum
detailed.def: The area that is smooth, located laterally of the frontal carina and is surrounded by sculptured regions of the upper face.

detailed.name: S7-first valvula muscle
detailed.def: The muscle that originates from the abdominal sternum 7 and inserts on the first valvula.

detailed.name: setal line
detailed.def: The row of setae that is located on the fore wing.

detailed.name: serrula
detailed.def: The notch that is located on the margin of sawtooth.

key: sensillar patch of the second valvifer

detailed.name: sensillar patch of the second valvifer
detailed.def: The patch that is composed of placoid sensilla adjacent to the intervalvifer articulation.

detailed.name: second valvifer-genital membrane muscle
detailed.def: The ovipositor muscle that arises anteriorly from the dorsal flange of the second valvifer and inserts anteriorly on the dorsal part of the genital membrane.

key: second axillary sclerite of the fore wing

detailed.name: second axillary sclerite of the fore wing
detailed.def: The second axillary sclerite  that is located on the mesothorax.

detailed.name: second abdominal tergal muscle
detailed.def: The abdominal muscle that inserts on the second abdominal tergum.

detailed.name: second abdominal sternal muscle
detailed.def: The abdominal muscle that inserts on the second abdominal sternum.

detailed.name: scutum
detailed.def: The area that is located on the alinotum and is situated anterior to the scutoscutellar suture.

detailed.name: scutellar tubercular projection
detailed.def: The process that is located just medially of the margin of the scutellar plate.

key: glandular release pit of the scutellum

detailed.name: glandular release pit of the scutellum
detailed.def: The area that is concave is located medially on the scutellar plate and corresponds to the opening of an exocrine gland.

detailed.name: scrobal sulcus
detailed.def: The sulcus that extends dorsomedially from the upper median margin of the antennal rim.

detailed.name: scapular flange
detailed.def: The area that is set off from the lateral area of the mesoscutum by the anteriorly extended dorsal axillar area.

detailed.name: sawtooth
detailed.def: The process that is located along the ventral margin of the first valvula or the dorsal margin of the second valvula.

detailed.name: salivarial sclerite
detailed.def: The sclerite that is located on wall of the salivarium and corresponds to the site of insertion of the ventral premento-salivarial muscle.

detailed.name: salivarial orifice
detailed.def: The anatomical space that is located on the boundary of the hypopharyngeal wall and the labium. The orifice is situated dorsally of the base of the glossa and corresponds to the opening for the salivarium.

detailed.name: metasterno-second abdominal sternal muscle
detailed.def: The second abdominal sternal muscle that arises from the metadiscrimenal lamella.

detailed.name: second sterno-metacoxal muscle
detailed.def: The metacoxal muscle that arises from the second abdominal sternum.

detailed.name: row of spurs
detailed.def: The row that is composed of spurs.

detailed.name: rod-like sensilla
detailed.def: The anatomical cluster that is composed of rod-like sensilla and is located apically on the distal labial palp segment.

detailed.name: ramus
detailed.def: The process that is located on the funicular segment.

detailed.name: radix
detailed.def: The area that is located on the lateral wall of the first and second valvulae and is without annuli.

detailed.name: pteralia of the fore wing
detailed.def: The pteralia that is located on the fore wing.

detailed.name: protuberance on malar space
detailed.def: The projection that is located ventrally on the malar space.

detailed.name: protrochanteral muscle
detailed.def: The leg muscle that inserts on the protrochanter.

detailed.name: protibial apical pegs
detailed.def: The row of spurs that extends along the apical margin of the fore tibia.

detailed.name: prospinasternum
detailed.def: The spinasternum that is located anterior to the mesopectus.

detailed.name: propodeal spine
detailed.def: The spine on the metapectal-propodeal complex that is paired and is medial to the propodeal spiracle.

detailed.name: propodeal areola
detailed.def: The area on the propodeum that is median and is delimited laterally by the median longitudinal carina.

detailed.name: propleural muscle
detailed.def: The muscle that inserts on the propleuron.

detailed.name: mesofurco-propleural arm muscle
detailed.def: The propleural muscle that arises form the mesofurca.

detailed.name: prophragmal muscle
detailed.def: The muscle that inserts on the prophragma.

detailed.name: pronotal triangle

detailed.def: The articular porcess that bears the cardinal condyle of the stipes and receives the site of attachment of the tentorio-cardinal muscle.

detailed.name: stipital fossa of the cardo
detailed.def: The fossa that articulates with the basistipital process.

detailed.name: medial stipital wall
detailed.def: The area that lays parallell with the lateral wall of the prementum.

detailed.name: basal lacinial sclerite
detailed.def: The sclerite that is on the medial stipital wall, connected to the lacinial lobe and receives the site of insertion of the stipito-lacinial muscle.

detailed.name: stipital thickening
detailed.def: The rim that extends along the anterior (dorsal) margin of the medial stipital wall.

detailed.name: medial dististipital process
detailed.def: The rim that is continuous proximally with the stipital thickening, is located distal to the cardino-stipital hinge and articulates distally with tha basal lacinial sclerite.

detailed.name: stipital sclerite
detailed.def: The sclerite that is on the medial stipital wall and bears the medial stipital process.

detailed.name: posterior stipital wall
detailed.def: The area that is limited medially by the medial stipital wall and proximolaterally by the margin of the posterior stipital sclerite.

detailed.name: posterior stipital sclerite
detailed.def: The sclerite that is located on the posterior stipital wall, articulates with the cardo and with the labial palp, is connected by conjunctiva distolaterally to the galeo-lacinial complex, proximally to the hypostoma and the cardo and proximolaterally to the mandible.

detailed.name: principal carina of stipes
detailed.def: The flange that extends along the margin of the posterior stipital wall.

detailed.name: maxillary palpal socket
detailed.def: The margin of the posterior stipital sclerite that is concave and accommodates the base of the maxillary palp.

detailed.name: cardinal condyle of the stipes
detailed.def: The condyle that articulates with the stipital fossa of the cardo.

detailed.name: ventral dististipital process
detailed.def: The projection that is located distally on the posterior stipital sclerite and encircles the base of the maxillary palp.

detailed.name: anterior tentorio-stipital muscle
detailed.def: The tentorio-stipital muscle that is anterior to the posterior tentorio-stipital muscle.

detailed.name: posterior tentorio-stipital muscle
detailed.def: The tentorio-stipital muscle that is posterior to the anterior tentorio-stipital muscle.

detailed.name: cardinal fragmentum
detailed.def: The sclerite that is elongate, paired, is lateral to the cardo and is articulated with the cardo and with the stipes.

detailed.name: medial stipital groove
detailed.def: The depression that extends medially and adjacent to the medial portion of the principal carina of stipes.

detailed.name: ocellar diameter
detailed.def: The diameter of the ocellus.

detailed.name: palpal formula
detailed.def: The ratio of the number of the maxillary sclerites and labial sclerites.

key: first sclerite of the maxillary palp

detailed.name: first sclerite of the maxillary palp
detailed.def: The sclerite that is ringlike and is connected distolaterally to the posterior stipital sclerite via conjunctiva and muscle.

detailed.name: stipito-palpal muscle
detailed.def: The maxillary muscle that arises from the posterior stipital sclerite and inserts on the first sclerite of the maxillary palp.

relationships.target_name: first sclerite of the maxillary palp

key: second sclerite of the maxillary palp

detailed.name: second sclerite of the maxillary palp
detailed.def: The sclerite that is ringlike and is connected distally to the first sclerite of the maxillary palp via conjunctiva and muscle.

key: third sclerite of the maxillary palp

detailed.name: third sclerite of the maxillary palp
detailed.def: The sclerite that is ringlike and is connected distally to the second sclerite of the maxillary palp via conjunctiva.

key: fourth sclerite of the maxillary palp

detailed.name: fourth sclerite of the maxillary palp
detailed.def: The sclerite that is ringlike and is connected distally to the third sclerite of the maxillary palp via conjunctiva.

key: first intrinsic muscle of the maxillary palp

detailed.name: first intrinsic muscle of the maxillary palp
detailed.def: The muscle that arises from the first sclerite of the maxillary palp and inserts on the second sclerite of the maxillary palp.

relationships.target_name: first sclerite of the maxillary palp
second sclerite of the maxillary palp

key: second intrinsic muscle of the maxillary palp

detailed.name: second intrinsic muscle of the maxillary palp
detailed.def: The muscle that arises from the first sclerite of the maxillary palp and inserts on the third sclerite of the maxillary palp.

relationships.target_name: first sclerite of the maxillary palp
third sclerite of the maxillary palp

key: third intrinsic muscle of the maxillary palp

detailed.name: third intrinsic muscle of the maxillary palp
detailed.def: The muscle that arises from the second sclerite of the maxillary palp and inserts on the third sclerite of the maxillary palp.

relationships.target_name: first sclerite of the maxillary palp
second sclerite of the maxillary palp

detailed.name: lacinial bar
detailed.def: The sclerite that is located on the lateral wall of the lacinial lobe.

detailed.name: occipital margin
detailed.def: The margin of the cranium that is dorsal in frontal view.

detailed.name: acantha
detailed.def: The process that corresponds to a single epidermal cell.

detailed.name: outer lobe of the lacinia
detailed.def: The lacinial lobe that is lateral to the inner lobe of the lacinia.

detailed.name: inner lobe of the lacinia
detailed.def: The lacinial lobe that is medial to the outer lobe of the lacinia.

detailed.name: anterior lacinial fimbriae
detailed.def: The row of setae that traverses the lacinia along its anterior margin.

detailed.name: posterior lacinial fimbriae
detailed.def: The row of setae that traverses the lacinia along its posterior margin.

detailed.name: lacinial comb
detailed.def: The row of setae on the lacinial lobe that is marginal.

detailed.name: stipito-premental conjunctiva
detailed.def: The conjunctiva that extends along the posterior (dorsal) margin of the premental arm and the proximal margin of the medial stipital wall.

detailed.name: galeo-lacinial complex
detailed.def: The area of the stipes that is delimited proximomedially by the stipito-premental conjunctiva, proximolaterally by the stipito-mandibular conjunctiva and posteroproximally by the margin of the posterior stipital sclerite.

detailed.name: distolateral galeal sclerite
detailed.def: The sclerite that is located on the lateral wall of the galeo-lacinial complex distaly of the lateral galeal crease and bears the distolateral galeal setiferous patch.

synonyms.name: apical transverse sclerotized part of galea

detailed.name: distolateral galeal setiferous patch
detailed.def: The setiferous patch that is located distolaterally on the galeo-lacinial complex.

detailed.name: proximolateral galeal setiferous patch
detailed.def: The setiferous patch that is located on the lateral wall of the galeo-lacinial complex proximally of the distolateral setiferous patch.

detailed.name: proximolateral galeal sclerite
detailed.def: The sclerite that is located on the lateral wall of the galeo-lacinial complex and bears the proximolateral galeal setiferous patch.

synonyms.name: basal elongate sclerotized part of galea

detailed.name: lateral galeal crease
detailed.def: The conjunctiva that is between the distolateral and proximolateral galeal sclerites.

detailed.name: galeal crown
detailed.def: The galeal fringe that extends along the distal margin of the distal galeal plate.

detailed.name: galeal fringe
detailed.def: The row of setae that extends along the margin of the galeo-lacinial complex, distal to the lacinial lobe.

detailed.name: galeal comb
detailed.def: The galeal fringe that is on the lateral margin of the apicolateral galeal plate.

detailed.name: proximal galeal brush
detailed.def: The row of setae that is on the distal margin of the proximolateral galeal sclerite.

detailed.name: galeal lamina
detailed.def: The lobe that is located medially on the internal wall of the galeo-lacinial complex and margined by the galeal comb.

detailed.name: galeal midrib
detailed.def: The carina that extends medially along the medial wall of the galeo-lacinial complex and that is longitudinal.

detailed.name: spiculate patch of lacinia
detailed.def: The area on the lacinial lobe that is covered with acanthae.

detailed.name: spiculate patch of the galea
detailed.def: The area on the galeo-lacinial complex distal to the lacinial lobe that is covered with acanthae.

detailed.name: velum
detailed.def: The flange that is transparent, and extends along the anterodistal margin of the galeo-lacinial complex distal to the lacinial lobe.

detailed.name: coeloconic sensillum of the galea
detailed.def: The coeloconic sensillum that is located on the medial surface of the galeo-lacinial complex distal to the base of the lacinial lobe.

detailed.name: apicomedial galeal plate
detailed.def: The sclerite that is located on the medial surface of the galeo-lacinial complex and bears the coeloconic sensillum of galea.

detailed.name: basal galeal sclerite
detailed.def: The sclerite that receives the site of insertion of the stipito-galeal muscle.

detailed.name: postmental area
detailed.def: The area that is limited distally by the posterior margin of the prementum and laterally by the median margins of the cardines and the stipites.

detailed.name: intercardinal area
detailed.def: The area that is located between the cardines and limited proximally and distally by the anatomical line that extends between the proximal and distal ends of the left and right cardines.

detailed.name: interstipital area
detailed.def: The area of the postmental area that is limited laterally by the median margins of the stipites, proximally by the anterior margin of the intercardinal area and distally by the proximal margin of the prementum.

detailed.name: postmental articular zone
detailed.def: The region that corresponds to the distal margin of the intercardinal area.

detailed.name: intercardinal sclerite
detailed.def: The sclerite on the intercardinal area that is not paired.

detailed.name: postarticular portion of the postmentum
detailed.def: The intercardinal sclerite that is connected distally to the prearticular portion of the postmentum.

detailed.name: prearticular portion of the postmentum
detailed.def: The interstipital sclerite that is connected proximally to the postarticular portion of the postmentum.

detailed.name: basal process of the prementum
detailed.def: The articular process that bears the postmental articular surface of the prementum.

detailed.name: lateral premental face
detailed.def: The area of the prementum, that lays parallel and connected via conjunctiva to the medial stipital vall.

detailed.name: labial palpal excision
detailed.def: The notch that is located distolaterally on the prementum and receives the base of the labial palp.

detailed.name: subligular process
detailed.def: The area of the prementum that is located between the labial palpal excisions and is limited posteriorly by the anatomical line extending between the proximalmost points of the excisions.

detailed.name: premental arm
detailed.def: The area of the lateral premental face that receives the site of origin of the dorsal premento-salivarial muscle.

detailed.name: ventral premental face
detailed.def: The area of the prementum that is delimited laterally by the lateral premental face.

detailed.name: premental carina
detailed.def: The flange that is adjacent to the border between the ventral and lateral premental faces and that overlaps externally the median part of the posterior stipital sclerite.

detailed.name: first valvifer-first valvula complex
detailed.def: The anatomical cluster that is composed of the sclerites that articulate with the ninth abdominal tergite and the second valvifer.

key: posterior margin of the first valvifer

detailed.name: posterior margin of the first valvifer
detailed.def: The margin of the first valvifer that is posterior and extends between the intervalvifer articulation and the anterior angle of the first valvifer.

key: ninth tergal condyle of the first valvifer

detailed.name: ninth tergal condyle of the first valvifer
detailed.def: The condyle that is located on the first valvifer and articulates with the first valviferal fossa of T9.

key: first valviferal fossa of the ninth tergite

detailed.name: first valviferal fossa of the ninth tergite
detailed.def: The fossa of the ninth abdominal tergite that is adjacent to the condyle of the ninth tergal condyle of the first valvifer.

detailed.name: transvalviferal conjunctiva
detailed.def: The conjunctiva that traverses the first valvifer and separates the dorsal and ventral sclerites of the first valvifer.

key: dorsal sclerite of the first valvifer

detailed.name: dorsal sclerite of the first valvifer
detailed.def: The sclerite of the first valvifer that is located dorsally of the transvalviferal conjunctiva.

key: ventral sclerite of the first valvifer

detailed.name: ventral sclerite of the first valvifer
detailed.def: The sclerite of the first valvifer that is ventral to the transvalviferal conjunctiva.

detailed.name: intravalvifer articulation
detailed.def: The articulation between the dorsal sclerite of the first valvifer and the ventral sclerite of the first valvifer.

key: anterior flange of the first valvifer

detailed.name: anterior flange of the first valvifer
detailed.def: The flange that extends anteriorly on the first valvifer and overlaps with the posterior margin of the anterior area of the second valvifer.

key: second valviferal condyle of the first valvifer

detailed.name: second valviferal condyle of the first valvifer
detailed.def: The condyle that is located on the first valvifer and articulates with the first valviferal fossa of the second valvifer.

key: anterior angle of the first valvifer

detailed.name: anterior angle of the first valvifer
detailed.def: The corner on the first valvifer that marks the posterior end of the first valvula.

key: anterior area of the second valvifer

detailed.name: anterior area of the second valvifer
detailed.def: The area of the second valvifer which is anterior to the anatomical line that is the shortest distance from the first valviferal fossa of the second valvifer and the ventral margin of the second valvifer.

key: posterior area of the second valvifer

detailed.name: posterior area of the second valvifer
detailed.def: the area of the second valvifer that is posterior to the anatomical line that is the shortest distance from the first valviferal fossa of the second valvifer to the ventral margin of the second valvifer

key: basal line of the second valvifer

detailed.name: basal line of the second valvifer
detailed.def: The line on the second valvifer that extends between the pars articularis and the dorsal flange of second valvifer.

key: dorsal projection of the second valvifer

detailed.name: dorsal projection of the second valvifer
detailed.def: The projection that is located on the second valvifer and corresponds to the proximal end of the rachis.

key: anterior section of dorsal flange of second valvifer

detailed.name: anterior section of dorsal flange of second valvifer
detailed.def: The area of the anterior area of the second valvifer that is anterior to the site of origin of the basal line, continuous with the dorsal flange of the second valvifer and marks the site of origin of the dorsal T9-2nd valvifer muscle part b.

relationships.target_name: dorsal flange of the second valvifer

key: posterior section of dorsal flange of second valvifer

detailed.name: posterior section of dorsal flange of second valvifer
detailed.def: The area of the dorsal flange of the second valvifer that is posterior to the to the site of origin of the basal line.

relationships.target_name: dorsal flange of the second valvifer

detailed.name: second valvifer-second valvula-third valvula complex
detailed.def: The area that is connected to the ninth tergite and the first valvifer via conjunctiva, is articulated to the first tergite, and bears the aulax.

key: venom gland reservoir of the second valvifer

detailed.name: venom gland reservoir of the second valvifer
detailed.def: The gland reservoir that is between the second valvifers.

detailed.name: bulb
detailed.def: The anterior area of the dorsal valve that is bulbous.

relationships.target_name: dorsal ramus of the second valvula

key: anterior notch of the dorsal valve

detailed.name: anterior notch of the dorsal valve
detailed.def: The notch that is on the anterior region of the dorsal valve and accommodates the ventral ramus of the second valvula and the first valvula.

relationships.target_name: dorsal ramus of the second valvula

key: distal notch of the dorsal valve

detailed.name: distal notch of the dorsal valve
detailed.def: The notch that is distal on the dorsal valve.

key: distal vertical conjunctiva of the second valvifer-third valvula complex

detailed.name: distal vertical conjunctiva of the second valvifer-third valvula complex
detailed.def: The conjunctiva that traverses the second valvifer-third valvula complex and is located distal to the median bridge of the second valvifer.

detailed.name: second valvifer-third valvula complex
detailed.def: The area of the second valvifer-second valvula-third valvula complex that is proximal to the basal articulation.

detailed.name: anterior ridge of T9
detailed.def: The ridge that extends along the anterior margin of female T9 and receives the site of origin of the ventral and the dorsal T9-second valvifer muscles.

detailed.name: sclerite of the maxillary palp
detailed.def: The sclerite that is part of the maxillary palp.

detailed.name: muscle attachment site
detailed.def: The area of muscle attachment.

detailed.name: S7
detailed.def: The sternite that is connected to the first valvula via muscles.

detailed.name: lateral T9-second valvifer muscle
detailed.def: The muscle that arises from the posteroventral parts of the female T9 and inserts on the median bridge.

detailed.name: female T8
detailed.def: The tergite that is connected to female T9 by muscles.

detailed.name: first valvifer-second valvifer muscle
detailed.def: The ovipositor muscle that arises from the interarticular ridge of the first valvifer and inserts on the second valvifer.

key: dorsal ramus of the second valvula

detailed.name: dorsal ramus of the second valvula
detailed.def: The area that extends along the dorsal margin of the second valvula, bears the processus articularis anteriorly and the processus musculares on the antero-dorsal region and articulates anteriorly with the second valvifer via the basal articulation.

detailed.name: egg canal
detailed.def: The anatomical space that is between the left and right olistheters.

key: medial conjunctiva of the first valvula

detailed.name: medial conjunctiva of the first valvula
detailed.def: The conjunctiva that extends medially along the first valvula.

detailed.name: length of dorsal projection
detailed.def: The anatomical line that is parallel with the longitudinal body axis and the shortest among the anatomical line that extends between the anterior and posterior margins of the dorsal projection of the second valvifer.

key: first sclerite of the labial palp

detailed.name: first sclerite of the labial palp
detailed.def: The sclerite that is ringlike and is connected distolaterally to the prementum via conjunctiva and muscle.

key: second sclerite of the labial palp

detailed.name: second sclerite of the labial palp
detailed.def: The sclerite that is ringlike and is connected distally to the first sclerite of the labial palp via conjunctiva and muscle.

key: third sclerite of the labial palp

detailed.name: third sclerite of the labial palp
detailed.def: The sclerite that is ringlike and is connected distally to the second sclerite of the labial palp via conjunctiva and muscle.

detailed.name: ligula
detailed.def: The anatomical cluster that is composed of the glossa, paraglossae and labial palps.

detailed.name: basiparaglossa
detailed.def: The proximal area of the paraglossa that is adjacent to the basiparaglossal brush.

detailed.name: basiparaglossal brush
detailed.def: The anteroproximal area of the paraglossa that is covered with long acanthae and corresponds to the ligament connecting the hypopharyngeal button with the basiparaglossal sclerite.

detailed.name: paraglossal sclerite
detailed.def: The anteroproximal sclerite of the paraglossa that bears the basiparaglossal brush.

detailed.name: basiparaglossal sclerite
detailed.def: The sclerite that is located medially on the paraglossa and articulates with the anterior glossal plate and is continuous with the hypopharyngeal rod..

detailed.name: ventrolateral basiglossal arm
detailed.def: The projection that is located proximolaterally on the anterior glossal plate and articulates with the basiparaglossal sclerite.

key: median conjunctiva of the anterior glossal plate

detailed.name: median conjunctiva of the anterior glossal plate
detailed.def: The median conjunctiva of the anterior glossal plate that is parallel with the anteroposterior body axis.

detailed.name: glossal annulus
detailed.def: The anatomical cluster of the glossa that is composed of connected annular hairs.

detailed.name: annular hair
detailed.def: The spine on the distal part of ligula that is connected proximolaterally to the neighboring glossal hair by a carina.

detailed.name: distal glossal edge
detailed.def: The transverse edge that extends distally on the glossa.

detailed.name: posterior surface of the glossa
detailed.def: The area of the glossa that is between the distal margin of the prementum and the distal glossal edge.

detailed.name: anterior surface of the glossa
detailed.def: The area of the glossa that is between the distal glossal edge and the anterior glossal plate.

detailed.name: apical glossal hairs
detailed.def: The row of spines that is on the distal glossal edge.

detailed.name: apical glossal setae
detailed.def: The row of setae of the glossa that is adjacent to the distal glossal edge.

detailed.name: styloconic sensillum
detailed.def: The seta that is on a process.

detailed.name: campaniform sensillum of the glossa
detailed.def: The campaniform sensillum of the anterior surface of the glossa that is located proximal to the glossal annuli.

detailed.name: distal hypopharyngeal invagination
detailed.def: The invagination on the distal hypopharynx that id adjacent to the concavities of the hypopharyngeal rods.

detailed.name: hypopharyngeal pecten
detailed.def: The anterolateral area of the distal hypopharynx that is adjacent with the proximal part of the hypopharyngeal rod proximal to the hypopharyngeal button and is covered with acanthae.

detailed.name: anterolateral wall of the stipes
detailed.def: The area that extends between anterior margin of the median wall of the stipes and the lateral margin of the posterior wall of the stipes and the base of the mandible and the labrum.

detailed.name: marginal fringe of the stipes
detailed.def: The anatomical cluster that is composed of the spines on the distal margin of the distolateral portion of the principal carina of the stipes.

detailed.name: distomedial stipital flange
detailed.def: The medial part of the principal carina of the stipes that is overlapped by the premental carina and overlaps the lateral premental face.

detailed.name: proximomedial stipital flange
detailed.def: The medial part of the principal carina of the stipes that is overlapped distally by the distomedial stipital carina and overlaps the lateral premental face and the proximal part of the prementum.

detailed.name: cranial fossa of the cardo
detailed.def: The fossa that is located on the cardo and articulates with the cardinal condyle of the cranium.

key: fifth sclerite of the maxillary palp

detailed.name: fifth sclerite of the maxillary palp
detailed.def: The sclerite that is ringlike and is connected distally to the fourth sclerite of the maxillary palp via conjunctiva.

detailed.name: uniporous sensillum
detailed.def: The sensillum whose cuticular component has one cuticular pore.

key: fourth intrinsic muscle of the maxillary palp

detailed.name: fourth intrinsic muscle of the maxillary palp
detailed.def: The muscle that arises from the third sclerite of the maxillary palp and inserts on the fourth sclerite of the maxillary palp.

relationships.target_name: third sclerite of the maxillary palp
fourth sclerite of the maxillary palp

detailed.name: interstipital sclerite
detailed.def: The sclerite that is located on the interstipital area and is connected to the prementum via conjunctiva.

key: Stipital articular surface of the postmentum

detailed.name: Stipital articular surface of the postmentum
detailed.def: The articular surface that articulates with the madial margin of the stipes.

detailed.name: median postmental ridge
detailed.def: The ridge that is limited laterally by the stipital articular surfaces of the postmentum.

detailed.name: postmento-premental hinge
detailed.def: The conjunctiva that is between the postmentum and prementum.

detailed.name: premental ditch
detailed.def: The scrobe of the prementum that is adjacent to and extends lateral to the premental carina and accommodates the medial part of the posterior stipital sclerite.

detailed.name: distal hypopharyngeal sclerite
detailed.def: The sclerite that receives the site of insertions of the dorsal and ventral premento-salivarial muscles and is continuous with the hypopharyngeal rod.

detailed.name: ligament
detailed.def: The area that is resilin rich.

detailed.name: ventral glossal lines
detailed.def: The carinae that radiates from the posterior glossal plate towards the apical glossal setae.

detailed.name: basal glossal invagination
detailed.def: The anterior invagination of the labium that is adjacent with the distal end of the salivarium and separates the glossa proximally from the distal hypopharynx and the paraglossae.

detailed.name: paraglossal acroglossal button
detailed.def: The sclerite that is located distally on the paraglossa.

detailed.name: paraglossal annulus
detailed.def: The anatomical cluster of the paraglossa that is composed of connected annular hairs.

detailed.name: hypopharyngeal button
detailed.def: The bent area of the hypopharyngeal rod that receives the site of insertion of the posterior tentorio-premental muscle.

detailed.name: salivary gland
detailed.def: The gland that empties anterior to the prementum.

detailed.name: salivary duct
detailed.def: The duct that leads from the salivary gland.

key: first intrinsic muscle of the labial palp

detailed.name: first intrinsic muscle of the labial palp
detailed.def: The muscle that arises from the first sclerite of the labial palp and inserts on the second sclerite of the labial palp.

relationships.target_name: first sclerite of the labial palp
second sclerite of the labial palp

key: second intrinsic muscle of the labial palp

detailed.name: second intrinsic muscle of the labial palp
detailed.def: The muscle that arises from the second sclerite of the labial palp and inserts on the third sclerite of the labial palp.

relationships.target_name: second sclerite of the labial palp
third sclerite of the labial palp

key: posteroventral corner of the first valvifer

detailed.name: posteroventral corner of the first valvifer
detailed.def: The corner of the first valvifer that is adjacent to the intervalvifer articulation.

key: length of anterior area of second valvifer

detailed.name: length of anterior area of second valvifer
detailed.def: The anatomical line that is parallel with the longitudinal body axis and the shortest among the anatomical lines that extend between the anterior and posterior margins of the anterior area of the second valvifer.

detailed.name: length of female T9
detailed.def: The anatomical line that is parallel with the longitudinal body axis and the shortest among the anatomical lines that extend between the anterior and posterior margins of female T9.

detailed.name: mandibular dentition
detailed.def: The anatomical cluster that is composed of the mandibular teeth.

detailed.name: galeal comb
detailed.def: The row of setae that is located on the medial wall of the galeo-lacinial complex proximal to the coeloconic sensilla of galea.

detailed.name: campaniform sensillum of the premenum
detailed.def: The campaniform sensillum that is on the ventral premental face.

detailed.name: distolateral premental incision
detailed.def: The concavity on the distal margin of the prementum delimiting medially the site of attachment of the labial palp.

detailed.name: labial palpomere
detailed.def: The sclerite that is part of the labial palp.

detailed.name: glossal styloconic sensillum
detailed.def: The styloconic sensillum that is located apically on the glossa.

detailed.name: medial apodeme of female S7
detailed.def: The apophysis that is located proximomedially on the female S7.

detailed.name: tubular A9
detailed.def: The conjunctiva that connects the female T8 with female T9 and is tubular.

detailed.name: metapleural sulcus
detailed.def: The sulcus that corresponds to the ridge that is continuous with the third phragma and extends between the metapleural apodeme.

detailed.name: posterior tooth of the mandible
detailed.def: The tooth tooth that is located on the posterior surface of the lower tooth.

detailed.name: clypeo-compound eye distance
detailed.def: The distance that is the shortest between the compound eye and the anterior tentorial pit and the compound eye.

detailed.name: eye height
detailed.def: The anatomical line that is the longest vertical diameter of the compound eye in frontal view.

detailed.name: cranial scrobe of mesoscutum
detailed.def: The scrobe on the mesonotum that accommodates the posterior surface of the cranium.

detailed.name: scrobal carina of the mesoscutum
detailed.def: The carina that delimits laterally the cranial scrobe of the mesoscutum.

detailed.name: metanoto-metapectal-propodeal conjunctiva
detailed.def: The conjunctiva that extends between the metanotum and the metapectal-propodeal complex.

detailed.name: profemoral scrobe of the mesopectus
detailed.def: The scrobe that is on the mesopectus and accommodates the profemur.

detailed.name: dorsolateral setal patch of propodeum
detailed.def: The setal patch that is elongate, is adjacent and extends just lateral to the plica and is composed of posteriorly directed and apressed setae that inserts into the retinaculum when the fore wing is in a flexed position.

key: anterodistal notch of the fore wing

detailed.name: anterodistal notch of the fore wing
detailed.def: The notch that is on the anterior wing margin, is adacent to the anterior end of the poststigmal fold line.

key: posterodistal notch of the fore wing

detailed.name: posterodistal notch of the fore wing
detailed.def: The notch on the posterior wing margin that is adjacent to the posterior end of the discal fold.

detailed.name: petiole length
detailed.def: The median anatomical line that extends between the transverse carina on petiole and the posterior margin of the petiole.

detailed.name: epistomal distance
detailed.def: The anatomical line that is the shortest between the anterior tentorial pits.

detailed.name: anterolateral mesopectal projection
detailed.def: The projection that is located anterolaterally on the epicnemial carina.

detailed.name: petiolar scrobe
detailed.def: The scrobe that is located ventrally of the propodeal foramen and accommodates the proximal area of the petiole.

detailed.name: lateroventral carina of the petiole
detailed.def: The carina that is longitudinal and extends lateroventrally on the abdominal segment 2.

detailed.name: median conjunctiva of abdominal tergum 9
detailed.def: The conjunctiva of abdominal tergum 9 that is median and longitudinal.

detailed.name: head width
detailed.def: The anatomical line that is the longest horizontal diameter of the cranium in frontal view.

detailed.name: facet
detailed.def: The portion of cuticle that covers externally the cellular components of the ommatidium.

detailed.name: ventral margin of the mesopectus
detailed.def: The median anatomical line that extends between the acetabular carina and the medial coxal articulations.

detailed.name: ventral margin of the metapectus
detailed.def: The median anatomical line that extends between the anterior margin of the ventral region of the metapectus and the distal end of the projection bearing the medial coxal condyle of the metapectus.

detailed.name: median anatomical line
detailed.def: The anatomical line that extends in the median axis of the organism.

detailed.name: proximodistal anatomical line
detailed.def: The anatomical line that extends between the proximal and distal margins of an anatomical structure.

detailed.name: head+mesosoma length
detailed.def: The median anatomical line that is the longest between the anterior margin of the head and the propodeal foramen in dorsal view.

detailed.name: mesosoma height
detailed.def: The anatomical line that is parallel with the posterior margin of the metapectal-propodeal complex, is adjacent to the anterior margin of the mesocoxa and extends between the dorsal and ventral margins of the mesosoma.

detailed.name: posterior mesoscutellar area
detailed.def: The area delimited by the posterior mesoscutellar carina and by the posterior margin of the mesoscutellum.

detailed.name: posterior mesoscutellar carina
detailed.def: The carina on the posterior face of the mesoscutellum that is dorsally convex.

detailed.name: posterolateral mesoscutellar area
detailed.def: The area delimited by the posterolateral mesoscutellar carina and the ventral margin of the mesoscutellum

detailed.name: posterolateral mesoscutellar carina
detailed.def: The carina on the posterodorsal mesoscutellum that is dorsally convex.

detailed.name: anterior part of pronotal plate
detailed.def: The area medially on the anterior rim of the pronotum that is distinctly delineated and its outline directly continuous with the scutellar foveae and the pronotal plate.

detailed.name: anteroventral depression of pronotum
detailed.def: The groove along the anteroventral border of the pronotum.

detailed.name: anteroventral foramen of metapleuron
detailed.def: The anatomical space delimited by a notch on the margin of the metapleuron in its anteroventral corner, opening towards a depression in the anterior part of the metasubpleuron.

detailed.name: propodeo-second abdominal segment muscle
detailed.def: The muscle that arises from the propodeum and inserts laterally on the second abdominal segment.

detailed.name: scutellar rim
detailed.def: Tha carina that extends externally of the scutellar plate and is parallel to the margin of the scutellar plate.

detailed.name: dorsal rim of pronotal plate
detailed.def: The carina that extends along the posterior border of the pronotal plate.

detailed.name: pronotal fovea
detailed.def: The well delineated depressed area that is submedian on the pronotum, and is delimited medially by the median bridge of the pronotal plate.

detailed.name: median septum of scutellum
detailed.def: The area that is median and separates the scutellar foveae.

detailed.name: ovipositor clip
detailed.def: The anatomical cluster that is composed of the distal notch on the second valvula and the associated dentition and flexible flap.

detailed.name: posterior lobe of scutellum
detailed.def: The part of the mesoscutellum that protrudes posteriorly as a distinct shape beyond any smooth or straight posterior outline, especially when protruding posteriorly past the anterior margin of the metanotum

detailed.name: posterior part of pronotal plate
detailed.def: The area of the pronotal plate that is posterior to the pronotal foveae.

detailed.name: subcalyptral area
detailed.def: The area of the propodeum that is  delimited dorsally by the calyptra and posteriorly delimited by the lateral propodeal carina.

detailed.name: window under lateral bar
detailed.def: The anatomical space that is encircled by the lateral bar of the mesoscutellum.

detailed.name: posteroventral corner of metapleuron
detailed.def: The corner at the intersection of the ventrolateral and posterior margin of the metapleuron.

detailed.name: pronoto-mesoscutal suture
detailed.def: The line of separation between the pronotum and the mesoscutum.

detailed.name: pronoto-mesopectal suture
detailed.def: The line of separation between the pronotum and the mesopectus.

detailed.name: mesopleural line
detailed.def: The straight line that extends ventrally on the lateral (vertical) surface of the mesopectus and is oriented anteroposteriorly.

detailed.name: metapleuron
detailed.def: The area of the metapectal-propodeal complex that is anterior to the metapleural carina and lateral to the metadiscrimen.

detailed.name: seta
detailed.def: The sensillum with a hair-like cuticular component.

detailed.name: sensillum basiconicum
detailed.def: The trichoid sensillum that is apically rounded.

detailed.name: lateral clypeal seta
detailed.def: The seta that is located laterally on the clypeus.

detailed.name: large volcano sensilla
detailed.def: The sensillum with a distal, volcano-shape cuticular component on the apical-most flagellomere.

detailed.name: large disc sensilla
detailed.def: The row of sensilla whose cuticular component are flat, circular and lack a median peg.

detailed.name: sensillum coeloconicum A
detailed.def: The sensillum coeloconicum, in which the diameter of the tip of the hairlike cuticular component is 1/3-1/5 of the diameter of the surrounding depression.
