detailed.name: sensillum coeloconicum B
detailed.def: The sensillum coeloconicum, in which the diameter of the tip of the hairlike cuticular component is as wide as the surrounding depression.

detailed.name: axillar crescent
detailed.def: The anatomical cluster composed of the transaxillar carina, axillar carina, and axillular carina.

detailed.name: appendage segment
detailed.def: The segment that is metameric along the proximal-distal axis and is part of an appendage.

detailed.name: width
detailed.def: A 1-D extent quality which is equal to the distance from one side of an object to another side which is opposite.

detailed.name: mesosoma length
detailed.def: The anatomical line that connects the global minima of the contour line of the pronotal slope in lateral view when the specimen is rotated until the contour line becames as symmetric as possible and the posteriormost point of the propodeal lobe.

detailed.name: anterior petiolar length
detailed.def: The median anatomical line between the setal line of petiole and the transverse carina of petiole.

detailed.name: anterior pronotal slope
detailed.def: The concave area anteriorly on the mesosoma that accommodates the posterior area of the cranium.

detailed.name: anterior setal pit
detailed.def: The anteriormost setal pit on the dorsal side of the petiole.

detailed.name: dorsal petiolar scrobe
detailed.def: The scrobe that is dorsal to the propodeal foramen and accommodates the proximodorsal area of the petiole.

detailed.name: dorsal head width
detailed.def: The anatomical line between the intersections of the cranium contour and dorsal head line in frontal view.

detailed.name: dorsal head width
detailed.def: The anatomical line between the posteriormost (dorsalmost) points of compound eyes in frontal view.

detailed.name: distal clypeal line
detailed.def: The anatomical line that is perpendicular to the median anatomical line and is the tangent at the distalmost point(s) of the clypeus in frontal view.

detailed.name: diagonal petiolar length
detailed.def: The anatomical line that extends between the distalmost point of the subpetiolar process and the global minima of the contour line of the dorsal region of the posterior petiolar constriction in lateral view when the specimen is rotated until the contour line became as symmetric as possible.

detailed.name: caudal cylinder
detailed.def: The petiolar area posterior to the posterior petiolar constriction.

detailed.name: apical spine distance
detailed.def: The anatomical line between the distal ends of the propodeal spines.

detailed.name: external area of the scape
detailed.def: The area of the scape that faces away from the cranial surface in fully caudal scape position.

detailed.name: facial area of the scape
detailed.def: The area of the scape that faces the cranium surface when the scape is in fully flexed position.

detailed.name: transverse torular line
detailed.def: The anatomical line that is tangential to the posteriormost points of the antennal rims.

detailed.name: frontal carina line
detailed.def: The transverse torular line that extends between the frontal carinae.

detailed.name: lateral carina of clypeus
detailed.def: The carina that extends between the ventral (anterior) margin of the antennal foramen to the apical clypeal margin.

detailed.name: maximum cephalic length
detailed.def: The median anatomical line that extends between the posterior margin of the cranium and the distal clypeal line in frontal view.

key: maximum diameter of the compound eye

detailed.name: maximum diameter of the compound eye
detailed.def: The longest diameter of the eye.

detailed.name: maximum height of petiolar node
detailed.def: The anatomical line that is the longest between the dorsal margin of the petiole and the posterior petiolar distance and perpendicular to the posterior petiolar distance.

detailed.name: maximum petiole height
detailed.def: The anatomical line that is the longest between the ventral margin of the petiole and the dorsal margin of the petiole and is perpendicular to the ventral margin of the petiole in lateral view.

detailed.name: angle
detailed.def: An orientation inhering in a bearer by virtue of the bearer's placement at an angle.

detailed.name: setal angle
detailed.def: The angle of the proximodistal axis of the seta to the contour line of the bodypart where the seta is located.

key: maximum cephalic length in median line

detailed.name: maximum cephalic length in median line
detailed.def: The median anatomical line that extends between the posterior margin of the cranium and the distal margin of the clypeus in frontal view.

detailed.name: median clypeal notch
detailed.def: The median notch that is on the distal clypeal margin.

detailed.name: median clypeal notch depth
detailed.def: The anatomical line that is between the distal clypeal line and the proximalmost point of the distal clypeal notch in frontal view.

detailed.name: Maximum spiracle distance of propodeum
detailed.def: The anatomical line that connects the center of the propodeal spiracle with the posteriormost point of the propodeal lobe in lateral view.

detailed.name: pronotum width
detailed.def: The longest width of the pronotum in dorsal view.

detailed.name: length of petiolar node
detailed.def: The anatomical line that is the shortest between the center of the petiolar spiracle and the posterior margin of the petiole in lateral view.

key: anterodorsal spine of the petiolar node

detailed.name: anterodorsal spine of the petiolar node
detailed.def: The anterolateral spine of the dorsal side of the petiolar node.

detailed.name: apical petiolar spine distance
detailed.def: The anatomical line between the distal ends of the anterodorsal spines of the petiolar node.

detailed.name: petiole width
detailed.def: The maximum width of the petiole in dorsal view.

detailed.name: postocular distance
detailed.def: The median anatomical line of the cranium that is the longest between the dorsal margin of the cranium and the dorsal head width.

detailed.name: postpetiole length
detailed.def: The longest anatomical line that is perpendicular to the posterior margin of the postpetiole in lateral view and is between the posterior postpetiolar margin and the anterior postpetiolar margin.

detailed.name: postpetiole width
detailed.def: The maximum width of the postpetiole in dorsal view.

detailed.name: cranial scrobe of the pronotum
detailed.def: The scrobe on the pronotum that accommodates the posterior surface of the cranium.

detailed.name: pronotal spine
detailed.def: The spine that is located at the dorsolateral edge of the cranial scrobe of the pronotum.

detailed.name: apical distance of pronotal spines
detailed.def: The anatomical line between the distal ends of the pronotal spines.

detailed.name: scape length
detailed.def: The proximodistal anatomical line of the scapal area that is distal to the radicle.

detailed.name: minimum spine distance
detailed.def: The shortest anatomical line between the lateral margins of the propodeal spines.

detailed.name: spine length
detailed.def: The anatomical line between the center of the propodeal spiracle and the distal end of the propodeal spine.

detailed.name: arithmetic mean
detailed.def: A  data item that is produced as the output of an averaging data transformation and represents the average value of the input data.

detailed.name: absolute cephalic size
detailed.def: The arithmetic mean of the maximum cephalic length in median line and the dorsal head width.

detailed.name: anterodorsal rim of petiole
detailed.def: The rim that is transverse and is at the posterior margin of the anterior profile of petiolar node.

detailed.name: circumantennal carinae
detailed.def: The anatomical cluster that is composed of concentric carinae that encircle the antennal foramen.

detailed.name: anterior profile of petiolar node
detailed.def: The anteriodorsal area of the petiolar node that is oriented anterodorsally and is delimited posteriorly by a dorsally or posterodorsally orineted area.

detailed.name: dorsal petiolar profile
detailed.def: The area of the petiolar node that is dorsomedial, and oriented dorsally and is delimited anteriorly by the anterior petiolar profile and posteriorly by the caudal petiolar profile.

detailed.name: caudal petiolar profile
detailed.def: The area of the petiolar node that is posterodorsal, oriented posterodorsally and is delimited anteriorly by a dorsally or anterodorsally oriented area.

detailed.name: portion of epithelium
detailed.def: The anatomical structure of the epithelium that is delimited by material or immaterial anatomical entities.

detailed.name: postocular area
detailed.def: The area of the cranium between the dorsal margin of the compound eye and the posterolateral cranial corner.

detailed.name: postocular contour line
detailed.def: The contour line of the postocular area in frontal view.

detailed.name: postocular head width
detailed.def: The anatomical line between the posteriormost points of the postocular contour lines.

detailed.name: metapleural area of the mesonoto-metanoto-mesopecto-metapecto-propodeal complex
detailed.def: The lateral (vertical) area that is posterior to the mesometapleural sulcus and anterior to the metapleural carina.

detailed.name: mesonoto-metanoto-mesopecto-metapecto-propodeal complex
detailed.def: The sclerite that is connected to the pronotum, propleura, fore, middle and hind legs and the petiole via conjunctiva.

detailed.name: metanotal depression
detailed.def: The transverse, dorsal groove on the mesonoto-metanoto-mesopecto-metapecto-propodeal complex posterior to the pronotal spiracle and anterior to the propodeal spiracle.

detailed.name: mesopleural area of the mesonoto-metanoto-mesopecto-metapecto-propodeal complex
detailed.def: The lateral (vertical) area that is anterior to the mesometapleural sulcus and posterior to the pronotum.

detailed.name: median carina of clypeus
detailed.def: The clypeal carina that is median.

detailed.name: submedian area of clypeus
detailed.def: The area between the median carina of clypeus and the lateral carina of clypeus.

detailed.name: ventral head line
detailed.def: The anatomical line between the anteriormost (ventralmost) points of compound eyes in frontal view.

detailed.name: torular head width
detailed.def: The anatomical line between the intersections of the cranium contour and transverse torular line line in frontal view. dorsal head width

detailed.name: ventral head width
detailed.def: The anatomical line between the intersections of the cranium contour and ventral head line in frontal view. dorsal head width

detailed.name: contour line
detailed.def: The boundary of the orthographic projection of a defined side of the anatomical structure.

detailed.name: gena contour line
detailed.def: The contour line of the gena area in frontal view.

key: anterior profile of petiolar node contour line

detailed.name: anterior profile of petiolar node contour line
detailed.def: The contour line of the anterior profile of petiolar node in lateral view.

detailed.name: dorsal petiolar profile contour line
detailed.def: The contour line of the dorsal petiolar profile in lateral view.

detailed.name: malar striae
detailed.def: The anatomical cluster posterior to the malar sulcus that is composed of carinae radiating from the pleurostomal condyle.

detailed.name: pleural pit line
detailed.def: The anatomical line between the mesopleural and metapleural pits.

detailed.name: width
detailed.def: The anatomical line that is perpendicular to the longitudinal axis of the anatomical structure and between one side of an object to the opposite side.

detailed.name: facial striae
detailed.def: The anatomical cluster anterior to the malar sulcus that is composed of carinae radiating from the pleurostomal condyle.

detailed.name: maximum width
detailed.def: The width that is the longest.

detailed.name: minimum width
detailed.def: The width that is the shortest.

detailed.name: reticulate
detailed.def: The sculpture that is composed of scutes.

detailed.name: supraclypeal depression
detailed.def: The median impression on the frons that is dorsal to the intertorular carina and is not a scrobe for receiving the scape.

detailed.name: ventromedian setiferous patch
detailed.def: The median setiferous patch that is on the frons between the intertorular carina and the facial pit.

detailed.name: ventrolateral setiferous patch
detailed.def: The sublateral setiferous patch that is on the frons between the intertorular carina and the facial pit, and is separated from the median setiferous patch by the supraclypeal depression.

detailed.name: intertorular area
detailed.def: The median area of the face between the dorsal (posterior) margin of the clypeus and the intertolural carina.

detailed.name: facial process
detailed.def: The process that is located on the upper face dorsal to the intertorular carina and corresponds internally to a conical apodeme and not the tentorium.

detailed.name: postocellar carina
detailed.def: The carina that connects the posterior margins of the left and right lateral ocellar fovea.

detailed.name: distal projection of the parossiculus
detailed.def: The distal projection of the volsella that corresponds to the apical parossiculal seta.

detailed.name: facial apodeme
detailed.def: The apodeme that is dorsal to the intertorular line and ventral to the anterior ocellus.

detailed.name: median facial keel
detailed.def: The carina whose dorsal (posterior) region overlaps the facial pit.

detailed.name: median flange of occipital carina
detailed.def: The flange that is median and on the occipital carina.

detailed.name: submedial flange of occipital carina
detailed.def: The flange that is submedial and is on the occipital carina.

detailed.name: distal projection of the penisvalva
detailed.def: The projection that is at the distal end of the penisvalva.

detailed.name: sensillar ring of harpe
detailed.def: The row of setae on the distomedial harpal wall that is parallel to the harpal margin.

detailed.name: anterior discrimenal pit
detailed.def: The pit at the anteriormost point of the mesodiscrimen.

detailed.name: proximolateral projection of the cupula
detailed.def: The projection that is between the proximodorsal notch of cupula and the proximoventral notch of the cupula.

detailed.name: proximoventral notch of cupula
detailed.def: The notch on the proximoventral margin of the cupula just lateral to the gonocondyle.

detailed.name: transverse line of the metanotum/propodeum
detailed.def: The line of the metanoto-propodeo-metapecto-mesopectal complex that connects the humeral sclerite to the third phragma.

key: anteromedian projection of the metanoto-propodeo-metapecto-mesopectal complex

detailed.name: anteromedian projection of the metanoto-propodeo-metapecto-mesopectal complex
detailed.def: The median projection on the anterior region of the metanoto-propodeo-metapecto-mesopectal complex.

detailed.name: transverse frontal carina
detailed.def: The transverse carina that is dorsal to the facial pit and ventral to the anterior ocellus.

detailed.name: torulo-clypeal carina
detailed.def: The carina that is connects the clypeus with the antennal rim.

detailed.name: subtorular carina
detailed.def: The carina that extends ventrally from the lateral margin of the antennal rim.

detailed.name: ventrolateral invagination of the pronotum
detailed.def: The invagination that at the ventrolateral edge of the pronotum.

detailed.name: sternaulus length
detailed.def: The straight anatomical line between the anterior and posterior ends of the sternaulus.

detailed.name: mesopleuron length
detailed.def: The anatomical line that extends between the lateral end of the epicnemial carina and the postpectal carina and is parallel to the lateroventral mesopleural carina.

detailed.name: anterior mesoscutal width
detailed.def: The anatomical line that is between the anterior ends of the left and right notauli.

detailed.name: posterior mesoscutal width
detailed.def: The anatomical line that is between the anterior margins of the left and right preaxillae.

detailed.name: harpe width
detailed.def: The width of the harpe in lateral view.

detailed.name: head height
detailed.def: The median anatomical line of the head in anterior view.

detailed.name: head length
detailed.def: The median anatomical line of the head in dorsal view.

detailed.name: harpe length
detailed.def: The anatomical line between the distalmost point of the gonostyle volsella complex and the distalmost point of the harpe in lateral view.

detailed.name: axillary muscle
detailed.def: The muscle that is attached to the axillary sclerite.

detailed.name: petiole neck
detailed.def: The anterior area of the petiole that is narrower than the posterior region in dorsal view.

detailed.name: buccal lobe
detailed.def: The area of the epipharyngeal wall that is posterior to the epipharyngeal lobe, is thicker than surrounding regions of the epipharyngeal wall and is covered with dorsally oriented acanthae.

detailed.name: body length
detailed.def: The anatomical line between the anteriormost pont of the cranium and the posteriormost point of the metasoma.

key: distoventral submedian corner of the cupula

detailed.name: distoventral submedian corner of the cupula
detailed.def: The submedial corner at the distoventral margin of the cupula.

detailed.name: trachea
detailed.def: The cuticular invagination that is tubular, branched into tracheoles and bears the taenidia.

detailed.name: atrium
detailed.def: The cuticular invagination that is sclerotized and is between the external aperture of the spiracle and the distal end of the trachea.

key: resilin rich articulation of the ramus

detailed.name: resilin rich articulation of the ramus
detailed.def: The resilin rich area that is ringlike and connects the ramus with the rest of the flagellomere.

detailed.name: posteromedian process of the mesoscutellum
detailed.def: The median spine that is on the posterodorsal region of the mesoscutellum.

detailed.name: sensillar plate of the aedeagus
detailed.def: The distal region of the aedeagus that is flat (delimited by an edge from the rest of the aedeagus) and bears four sensillum basiconicum.

detailed.name: metapecto-propodeal conjunctiva
detailed.def: The conjunctiva that connects the lateral end of the antecostal sulcus of the first abdominal tergum with the anterior margin of the metanoto-propodeo-metapecto-mesopectal complex.

detailed.name: posterodorsal metapleural area
detailed.def: The area that is anterior to the metapecto-propodeal conjunctiva, posterior to the metapleural pit and dorsal to the metapleural sulcus.

detailed.name: odontoid process
detailed.def: The flange that is located on the ventral edge of the mandible and not continuous with the mandibular condyle.

detailed.name: specillum
detailed.def: The median, smooth area that is smooth, is surrounded by sculptured areas and is on the abdominal mediotergite 4.

detailed.name: twelfth flagellomere
detailed.def: The flagellomere that is located immediately distal to the eleventh flagellomere.

detailed.name: axillular spine
detailed.def: The spine on the distal margin of the axillula.

detailed.name: anterior ocellar-orbital line
detailed.def: The anatomical line that is the shortest among the lines that connect the internal margin of the compound eyes and are tangential to the anteriormost point on the median ocellus.

detailed.name: apical setae of T3
detailed.def: The row of setae that is transverse and located distally on the third metasomal mediotergite and is composed of setae at least 2 times as long as other setae on the metasoma.

detailed.name: stigmal vein
detailed.def: The vein that is adjacent proximally to the pterostigma.

detailed.name: postpetiole height
detailed.def: The maximum distance between the dorsal and ventral margin of the postpetiole in lateral view.

detailed.name: scute
detailed.def: The area that is 5–35 µm wide, polygonal, repetitive, is delimited by lines and is the element of the reticulate sculpture.

detailed.name: lateral mesosoma length
detailed.def: The anatomical line between the anteriormost point of the anterior rim of pronotum and the posterodorsal edge of the nucha in lateral view.

key: transverse carina of the metasomal depression

detailed.name: transverse carina of the metasomal depression
detailed.def: The carina that is transverse and dorsal to the nucha.

detailed.name: coriaceous
detailed.def: The reticulate that is composed of convex scutes.

detailed.name: alutaceous
detailed.def: The reticulate that is composed of flat scutes.

key: dorsomedian area of the mesoscutellar-axillar complex

detailed.name: dorsomedian area of the mesoscutellar-axillar complex
detailed.def: The dorsomedian area of the mesoscutellar axillar complex including the scutellar fovea and the mesoscutellar disc.

detailed.name: prepalpal ventral premental area
detailed.def: The area that is anterior to the anatomical line connecting the left and right labial palpal excisions.

detailed.name: postpalpal ventral premental area
detailed.def: The area that is posterior to the anatomical line connecting the left and right labial palpal excisions.

detailed.name: latero-proximal stipital process
detailed.def: The projection that is on the proximolateral margin of the posterior stipital sclerite.

detailed.name: cranial condyle of cardo
detailed.def: The condyle of the cardo that inserts into the cardinal condyle of the cranium and is adjacent to the cranial fossa of the cardo.

detailed.name: Distal lateral projection of cardo
detailed.def: The corner that is located laterally on the distal margin of the cardo.

detailed.name: Distal mesal projection of cardo
detailed.def: The corner that is located medially on the distal margin of the cardo.

key: lateral flange of the principal carina of the stipes

detailed.name: lateral flange of the principal carina of the stipes
detailed.def: The flange on the lateral part of the prinicipal carina of the stipes.

key: distal lobe of the lateral flange of the principal carina of the stipes

detailed.name: distal lobe of the lateral flange of the principal carina of the stipes
detailed.def: The area of the lateral flange of the principal carina of the stipes distal to the notch of the principal carina of the stipes.

relationships.target_name: lateral flange of the principal carina of the stipes

key: proximal lobe of lateral flange of the principal carina of the stipes

detailed.name: proximal lobe of lateral flange of the principal carina of the stipes
detailed.def: The area of the lateral flange of the principal carina of the stipes proximal to the notch of the principal carina of the stipes.

relationships.target_name: lateral flange of the principal carina of the stipes

detailed.name: lateral galeal sclerite
detailed.def: The sclerite that is located laterally on the lateral wall of the galeo-lacinial complex.

detailed.name: trichoid sensillum of the glossa
detailed.def: The trichoid sensillum that is on the posterior surface of the glossa.

detailed.name: campaniform stipital sensillum
detailed.def: The campaniform sensillum on the stipes.

detailed.name: triangular mesopleural furrow
detailed.def: The ventrolateral, triangular impression adjacent posteriorly to the acetabular carina.

detailed.name: anteroposterior anatomical line
detailed.def: The anatomical line that extends between the anterior and posterior margins of an anatomical structure.

detailed.name: eye-torulus distance
detailed.def: The anatomical line that is the shortest distance between the compound eye and the torulus.

detailed.name: thirteenth flagellomere
detailed.def: The flagellomere that is located immediately distal to the twelfth flagellomere.

detailed.name: maximum diameter
detailed.def: The diameter that is the longest.

detailed.name: minimum diameter
detailed.def: The diameter that is the shortest.

detailed.name: microtrichia
detailed.def: The acantha that is on the wing blade.

detailed.name: maximum height
detailed.def: The height that is the longest.

detailed.name: posterodorsal metapleural sulcus
detailed.def: The groove on the posterodorsal margin of the metapleuron.

detailed.name: subacropleural sulcus
detailed.def: The groove ventral to the acropleural sulcus and anterior to the prespecular sulcus that extends toward the mesopleural pit.

detailed.name: postepomial sulcus
detailed.def: The sulcus along the dorsal margin of the transverse pronotal carina that is posterior to the epomial carina and ventral to the pronotal suprahumeral sulcus

detailed.name: anterior mesepisternal area
detailed.def: The area delimited anteriorly by the pronotal-mesopectal suture, posterodorsally by the ventral limit of the subacropleural sulcus, and posteroventrally by the episternal foveal line.

detailed.name: dorsal length of pronotum
detailed.def: The median anatomical line of the pronotum in dorsal view.

detailed.name: length of mesoscutellar-axillar complex
detailed.def: The median anatomical line of the mesoscutellar-axillar complex in dorsal view.

detailed.name: length of metanotum
detailed.def: The median anatomical line of the metanotum in dorsal view.

detailed.name: dorsal length of propodeum
detailed.def: The median anatomical line of the metapectal-propodeal complex in dorsal view.

detailed.name: length of 1st flagellomere
detailed.def: The proximodistal anatomical line of the 1st flagellomere.

detailed.name: width of 1st flagellomere
detailed.def: The width of the 1st flagellomere.

detailed.name: width of pedicel
detailed.def: The maximum width of the pedicel.

detailed.name: lateral eye height
detailed.def: The anatomical line that is the longest vertical diameter of the compound eye in lateral view.

detailed.name: length of malar sulcus
detailed.def: The straight anatomical line between the proximal and distal ends of the malar sulcus.

detailed.name: lateral head length
detailed.def: The anatomical line that connects the widest point between the apical edge of the compound eyes and extends to the anterior and posterior cranial margins in lateral view.

detailed.name: dorsal length of mesoscutum
detailed.def: The mesoscutum length in dorsal view.

detailed.name: width of mesoscutellar-axillar complex
detailed.def: The maximum width of the mesoscutellar-axillar complex in dorsal view.

detailed.name: propodeal spiracle-metanotum distance
detailed.def: The anatomical line that is the shortest between the first abdominal spiracle and the lateral margin of the metanotum.

detailed.name: diameter of propodeal spiracle
detailed.def: The maximum diameter of the first abdominal spiracle.

detailed.name: length of T1
detailed.def: The median anatomical line of the abdominal tergum 2.

detailed.name: length of hypopygium
detailed.def: The median anatomical line of the hypopygium in ventral view.

detailed.name: T7+8
detailed.def: The distal region of the female abdomen whose posterior portion bears the cerci and the anterior portion is part of female T9.

detailed.name: prospinasterno-procoxal muscle
detailed.def: The procoxal muscle that arises from the prorspinasternum.

detailed.name: metanoto-metalaterophragmal muscle
detailed.def: The metalaterophragmal muscle that arises from the metanotum.

detailed.name: corpotendon
detailed.def: The anteromedian apodeme on the tentorial bridge that receives the posterior contractor of the pharynx.

detailed.name: mola
detailed.def: The proximomedial region of the mandible that is adjacent to the mola of the opposite mandible and serves as a grinding surface.

detailed.name: mandibular rod
detailed.def: The sclerotised invaginations that are tubular and are inside the mandible.

detailed.name: apical peg
detailed.def: The peg-shaped sensillum that is apical on the apicalmost sclerite of the labial palp.

detailed.name: hind wing tegula
detailed.def: The tegula of the hind wing.

detailed.name: lateral incision of metanoum
detailed.def: The conjunctiva that is between the anterior and posterior metanotal wing processes.

detailed.name: cup-shaped apodeme of metabasalare
detailed.def: The apodeme that is cup shaped and recieves the site of insertion of the metabasalar muscles.

detailed.name: articular inflection
detailed.def: The fossa that receives the metepimeral condyle of abdomina tergum 1.

detailed.name: posterior paracoxal ridge
detailed.def: The paracoxal ridge that is posterior to the site of origin of the posterior metapleuro-metabasalar muscle.

detailed.name: metapectal plate
detailed.def: The flange that is on the paracoxal ridge and that serves as the site of attachment for the the anterior metapleuro-metabasalar and median metapleuro-metacoxal muscles.

detailed.name: articular notch
detailed.def: The notch at the base of the lateral coxal condyle of the metapleuron.

relationships.target_name: lateral coxal condyle of the metapleuron

detailed.name: anterior metafurcal arm
detailed.def: The apodeme that is located anteromedially on the lateral metafurcal arm and corresponds to the site of origin of the lateral metafurco-mesofurcal muscle.

key: sturdy spines of the hind femur

detailed.name: sturdy spines of the hind femur
detailed.def: The spine that is located on the ventral face of the metafemur.

detailed.name: preapical tibial spurs
detailed.def: The anatomical cluster that is composed of the spurs that are proximal to the distal margin of the tibia.

detailed.name: median antecostal projection
detailed.def: The projection that extends over the median portion of the antecostal sulcus.

detailed.name: lateral antecostal projection
detailed.def: The projection that extends over the lateral portion of the antecostal sulcus.

detailed.name: metalaterophragmal lobe
detailed.def: The flange of the metalaterophragma that is lateral and serves as the site of origin of the ph3-T2 muscle.

detailed.name: T2 longitudinal internal ridge
detailed.def: The longitudinal ridge of the petiole that is median.

detailed.name: abdominal segment 2-abdominal segment 1 articulation
detailed.def: The articulation that is composed of the articular surfaces of abdominal segment 1 and abdominal segment 2.

detailed.name: furcula
detailed.def: The sclerite that is proximal to the second valvifer and receives the site of origin of the posterior second valvifer-second valvula muscle.

detailed.name: meconium
detailed.def: The acellular anatomical structure that is in the hind gut of the pupa.

detailed.name: prothoracic katepisternum
detailed.def: The sclerite that is between the propleuron and the procoxa. The intrinsic muscle of the propleuron inserts on the conjunctiva anterior to the prothoracic katepisternum.

detailed.name: laterosternal sclerite
detailed.def: The sclerite that is between the procoxa and the prosternum.

detailed.name: transscutal ridge
detailed.def: The ridge that is adjacent posteriorly to the transscutal articulation.

detailed.name: internal median longitudinal scutoscutellar ridge
detailed.def: The ridge that is median and is at the posterior region of the mesoscutellum.

detailed.name: internal septum
detailed.def: The flange that extends along the margin of the mesoscutellum reducing its opening into the lumen of the mesoscutellum.

detailed.name: basalar apodeme
detailed.def: The cup-shaped, sclerotised region et the apical portion of the tendon of the basalare that serves as the site of origin of the basalare muscles.

detailed.name: supramesopleural sclerite
detailed.def: The sclerite that is located anterodorsally on the metapectus, posterior to the postalar process.

detailed.name: prospinasternal apodeme
detailed.def: The apodeme on the anteroventral margin of the mesopectus that serves as the site of origin of prospinasternal muscles.

detailed.name: mesospinasternal apodeme
detailed.def: The apodeme that is oriented poseteriorly and arises from the mesodiscrimenal lamella at the base of the mesofurca.

detailed.name: metepisternal anapleural cleft
detailed.def: The notch on the anterior margin of the metapectus just ventrally of the metapleural arm.

detailed.name: paracoxal notch
detailed.def: The notch that is at the lateral end of the paracoxal sulcus.

detailed.name: nygma
detailed.def: The sclerotized, round patch in the middle of wing cell.

detailed.name: anterior metapleural carina
detailed.def: The carina that is parallel to and extends anteroventrally of the metapleural carina, is continuous with the metapleural apodeme and is separated from the metapleural carina by a crenulate impresion

key: basal longitudinal carinae of the syntergum

detailed.name: basal longitudinal carinae of the syntergum
detailed.def: The anteroposteriorly oriented carinae that arise posteriorly from the transverse carina on petiole.

detailed.name: flagellar scrobe of scape
detailed.def: The scrobe on the ventral region of the scape that accommodates the flagellum when it is pressed against the scape.

detailed.name: median conjunctiva of cardines
detailed.def: The conjunctiva that separates the left and the right cardines.

detailed.name: mesoscutellar comb
detailed.def: The median row of spines on the mesoscutellum.

detailed.name: mesonotal fossa of the pronotum
detailed.def: The submedian fossa that is located on the dorsal margin of the pronotum and accommodates the pronotal condyle of the mesonotum.

detailed.name: pronotal condyle of the mesoscutum
detailed.def: The submedial condyle that is located on the ventral margin of the mesoscutum and inserts into the mesonotal fossa of the pronotum.

detailed.name: pronoto-mesonotal articulation
detailed.def: The articulation that is composed of the pronotal condyle of the mesoscutum and the mesonotal fossa of the pronotum.

detailed.name: posterior mesosomal comb
detailed.def: The row of setae that extends along the posterolateral edge of the metanoto-propodeo-mesopecto-metapectal complex and the metacoxa.

detailed.name: posterodorsal branch of pronotal Y
detailed.def: The sulcus that connects the transverse pronotal sulcus and the posterior margin of the pronotum ventral to the anterior thoracic spiracle and together with the ventral portion of the transverse pronotal sulcus delimits anteriorly the site of origin of the pronoto-mesobasalar muscle.

detailed.name: proximodorsal apodeme of cupula
detailed.def: The median apodeme on the proximodorsal region of the cupula.

detailed.name: Proximodorsal inflection of cupulal margin
detailed.def: The median area at the  proximodorsal cupulal margin that is inflected and serves as the site of origin of the  dorsomedial cupulo-gonostipal muscles.

detailed.name: proximodorsal projection of harpe
detailed.def: The median projection on the proximodorsal region of the harpe that accommodates tha gonossiculus when it is pressed against the harpe.

detailed.name: Proximomedial brush of the harpe
detailed.def: The setiferous patch on the medial surface of the harpe.

key: transverse row of setae of cercus

detailed.name: transverse row of setae of cercus
detailed.def: The row of setae that is transverse and delimits the distal cercal area on T9.

detailed.name: Ventral invagination of mesometapleural sulcus
detailed.def: The invagination that is at the ventral end of the of the mesometapleural sulcus.

key: ventral invagination of the metapleural carina

detailed.name: ventral invagination of the metapleural carina
detailed.def: The invagination that is at the ventral end of the of the metapleural carina.

detailed.name: clypeus-torulus distance
detailed.def: The anatomical line that is the shortest between the ventral margin of the torulus and the epistomal sulcus.

detailed.name: anterior ocellus-torulus distance
detailed.def: The anatomical line that is the shortset between the ventral margin of the anterior ocellus and the dorsal margin of the torulus.

detailed.name: sixth maxillary palpal sclerite
detailed.def: The sclerite that is ringlike and is connected via conjunctiva distally to the fifth sclerite of the maxillary palp via conjunctiva.

detailed.name: horizontal plate
detailed.def: The flange that extends dorsolaterally from the mesodiscrimenal lamella.

synonyms.name: horizontal plate of the mesosternal apophysis

detailed.name: labio-hypopharyngeal lobe
detailed.def: The anatomical cluster that is composed of the labium and the hypopharynx.

detailed.name: palpiger
detailed.def: The sclerite that is between the basal segment of the labial palp and the prementum.

detailed.name: second lateral area
detailed.def: The area of propodeal-metapectal complex that is posterior to the first lateral area and medial to the lateral longitudinal carina.

detailed.name: Heitler's lump
detailed.def: The distal invagination of the ventral femoral wall that is in contact with the tibial flexor sclerite or with the genuflexor sclerite when the tibial flexor muscle is fully contracted and the femoro-tibial joint is fully flexed.

detailed.name: tibial flexor sclerite
detailed.def: The proximal sclerite of the tibial flexor tendon.

detailed.name: tibial flexor muscle
detailed.def: The intrinsic leg muscle that arises medially (ventrally) of the femur and inserts on the genuflexor plate.

detailed.name: lock
detailed.def: The anatomical cluster that is composed of two sclerite surfaces, that are adjacent to each other and that prevent the movement of a joint.

key: ventral lock of the femoro-tibial joint

detailed.name: ventral lock of the femoro-tibial joint
detailed.def: The lock between a sclerite that is on or continuous with the tibial flexor tendon and the ventral femoral wall.

detailed.name: tibial flexor tendon
detailed.def: The tendon that is connected to the distal end of the tibial flexor muscle.

detailed.name: genuflexor apodeme
detailed.def: The cuticular invagination at the distal end of the genuflexor sclerite that is adjacent to (articulates with) the outerwall of the tibia.

detailed.name: proximodorsal process of the tibia
detailed.def: The process that is located laterally (dorsally) on the proximal margin of the tibia and corresponds to the site of insertion of the tibial extensor muscle.

detailed.name: tibial extensor muscle
detailed.def: The intrinsic leg muscle that arises laterally (dorsally) of the femur and inserts on the dorsal process of the tibia.

detailed.name: internal protrusion
detailed.def: The rim that extends along the distal margin of the ventral femoral wall.

detailed.name: medial tooth of the mandible
detailed.def: The apical tooth of mandible that is between the dorsal tooth of mandible and the lower tooth.

detailed.name: acrosternal calyx
detailed.def: The paired and concave area on the acrostenite 7 that bears the orifice of type III exocrine glands.

detailed.name: acrotergal calyx
detailed.def: The concave area on the acrotergite on abdominal tergite 7 that bears the orifice of type III exocrine glands.

detailed.name: medio-ventral concavity of T6
detailed.def: The posterior, concave area on the ventral side of the cuticle surface of abdominal tergite 6 corresponds to the acroteral calyx on abdominal tergite 7 when the abdomen is in a retracted position.

detailed.name: tergal apodeme
detailed.def: The projection on the anterior margin on the abdominal tergite that serves as the site of insertion of lateral intertergal retractor muscle and for the the intertergal extensor muscle.

detailed.name: intertergal extensor muscle
detailed.def: The abdominal muscle that attaches to the tergal apodeme of the abdominal tergite and attaches posterior to the antecostal ridge of the subsequent tergite.

detailed.name: dorsal intertergal retractor
detailed.def: The abdominal muscle that attaches to the antecosta of two subsequent abdominal tergites.

detailed.name: lateral intertergal retractor muscle
detailed.def: The abdominal muscle that attaches to the tergal apodeme of an abdominal tergite and the antecosta of the subsequent tergite.

relationships.target_name: occlusor of the propodeal spiracle muscle

detailed.name: bulla of the Waterston's evaporatorium
detailed.def: The smooth, median area on the anterior part of the Waterston's evaportatorium posterior to the antecosta.

detailed.name: caudal setal row on T7
detailed.def: The transverse row of setae on the posterior region of abdominal T7.

detailed.name: distal crenulate carina
detailed.def: The transverse carina on the posterior abdominal T7 extending parallel to the caudal setal row on T7.

detailed.name: submedian patch on abdominal T7
detailed.def: The patch that is defined by leather-like microsculpture on the anterior region of abdominal T7 lateral to the Waterston's evaporatorium.

key: proximomedian lamella of the Waterston's evaporatorium

detailed.name: proximomedian lamella of the Waterston's evaporatorium
detailed.def: The flattened conjunctival invagination at the posterior margin of the Waterston's evaporatorium that folds over the posterior region of the evaporatorium.

detailed.name: anterior mesofurcal pit
detailed.def: The pit that corresponds to the anterior mesofurcal invagination.

detailed.name: anterior mesofurcal invagination
detailed.def: The invagination that arises medioventrally from the mespectus, anterior to the mesofucal pit and is continuous with the invagination of the mesofurca.

detailed.name: mesofurcal invagination
detailed.def: The invagination that forms the mesofurca.

detailed.name: postacetabular pits
detailed.def: Paired submedian pits located just posterior to the acetabular carina.

detailed.name: labral digit
detailed.def: The styloconic sensilla on the apical margin of the labrum.

detailed.name: pleated membrane
detailed.def: The accordion-like conjunctiva separates the occiput from the rest of the head capsule. The structure arises laterally at the base of the mandible.

detailed.name: subapical genal tooth
detailed.def: The projection at the ventral end of the genal carina.

detailed.name: socketed spine peg
detailed.def: The flattened mechanosensory hair on the ventral margin of the mandible.

detailed.name: posterior cranio-mandibular articulation
detailed.def: The cranio-mandibular articulation that is composed of the mandibular condyle and the pleurostomal fossa.

detailed.name: median pronotal line
detailed.def: The line that is located in the anteroposterior median line of the pronotum.

detailed.name: posteroventral mesal projection of pronotum
detailed.def: The projection at the ventromedian margin of the pronotum.

detailed.name: pronotal fossa of the mesopectus
detailed.def: The fossa that articulates with the posteroventral mesal projection of pronotum.

detailed.name: ventral pronoto-mesopectal articulation
detailed.def: The articulation between the posteroventral mesal projection of the pronotum and the pronotal fossa of the mesopectus.

detailed.name: submedian lines of scutellum
detailed.def: The submedial anteroposterior sulcus on the mesoscutellar axillar complex that is paired.

key: Membranous region anterior to each mesocoxa

detailed.name: Membranous region anterior to each mesocoxa
detailed.def: The notch of the ventral mesopectus on the anterior margin of the mesocoxal foramen.

detailed.name: hyaline break
detailed.def: The costal notch that is on the submarginal vein near the parastigma.

detailed.name: hypochaeta
detailed.def: The mechanosensory hair that projects backward from the anterior margin of the ventral surface of the forewing.

detailed.name: hairless streak
detailed.def: A bare region of the forewing immediately beyond the basal setal line behind the parastigma.

detailed.name: muscle nd
detailed.def: The muscle that arises from the gonossiculus and inserts on the phalloterama.

detailed.name: medial penisvalvo-gonossiculal muscle
detailed.def: The penisvalvo-gonossiculal muscle that is medial to the lateral penisvalvo-gonossiculal muscle and attaches to the basiura.

detailed.name: lateral penisvalvo-gonossiculal muscle
detailed.def: The penisvalvo gonossiculal muscle that is lateral to the medial penisvalvo-gonossiculal muscle and attaches to the digiceps

detailed.name: lateral gonostyle/volsella complex-volsella muscle
detailed.def: The gonostyle/volsella complex-volsellal muscle that arises laterally of the submedian conjunctiva on the distoventral margin of gonostyle/volsella complex.

detailed.name: intragonostyle muscle
detailed.def: The muscle that connects the ventral and dorsal walls of the gonostyle basally.

detailed.name: penisvalvo-median sclerotized style muscle
detailed.def: The muscle that attaches to the median sclerotized style and to the valvura.

detailed.name: carina mandibularis
detailed.def: The edge that separates the external and insternal surfaces of the mandible.

detailed.name: intertegular distance
detailed.def: The anatomical line that connects the inner margins of the right and left tegula.

detailed.name: venom gland
detailed.def: The accessory gland that is not paired and that empties into the female reproductive duct and that is of class I gland.

detailed.name: vagina
detailed.def: The distalmost region of the female genital duct.

detailed.name: 2nd valvifer-vagina muscle
detailed.def: The muscle that arises from the second valvifer and inserts on the vagina.

detailed.name: 2nd valvifer-venom gland reservoir muscle
detailed.def: The muscle that arises from the second valvifer and inserts on the venom gland reservoir.

relationships.target_name: venom gland reservoir of the second valvifer

key: ventral wall of the second valvulae

detailed.name: ventral wall of the second valvulae
detailed.def: The ventral, usually weakly sclerotized region of the second valvulae, that is medially continuous with the rachises.

detailed.name: sperone
detailed.def: The longitudinal ridge on medially on the internal surface of the distal region of the second valvula. second valvula.

detailed.name: Dufour's gland
detailed.def: The accessory gland that is not paired and that empties into the female reproductive duct and that is of class III gland.

detailed.name: sensillar row of the 2nd valvifer
detailed.def: The row of styloconic sensilla along the proximal margin of the anterior area of the second valvifer.

synonyms.name: sensilla on edge of the second valvifers

relationships.target_name: anterior area of the second valvifer

detailed.name: post-ramus flap
detailed.def: The distal area of the dorsal projection of the second valvifer that is widened and is flexibly connected to the proximal region of the dorsal projection of the second valvifer.

detailed.name: Medial ridge of the 2nd valvifer
detailed.def: The ridge that is on the anterior section of the dorsal flange and serves as the site of insertion of T9-2nd valvifer muscle part b.

relationships.target_name: anterior section of dorsal flange of second valvifer

detailed.name: 7th abdominal sternum-vagina muscle
detailed.def: The muscle that is attached to vagina and to the 7th abdominal sternum.

detailed.name: part_of
detailed.def: The muscle that arises anteromedially from the second valvifer and inserts inside the lumen of second valvula.
